TED is a great educational tool I use for my English classes at all levels. The great thing about it is the variety of topics for the presentations, which makes it suitable for the students because they can watch only those videos they really enjoy. Another great thing is that due to the fact that many of the presenters are ESL speakers, your students can benefit from different English accents, especially when they are getting ready to take an international standardized test. Highly recommended.

I did not find it very effective for learning Spanish.I HATE that the version I bought was on CD...  said it needed an update...  turned itself into a 'cloud' version without asking or giving me any options.  I only did this course on one PC in my home office.  There is absolutely no need to go to the cloud every time I open it, but it does.  I actually unplug my network cable to prevent that.It also automatically started the timed support when I was not in a position to study, so all the support was wasted.I have found much better courses out there that don't force you onto their cloud system.  Also there are some photos that they use that are impossible to understand unless you look them up.I don't recommend and I will NEVER buy another Rosetta Stone product.

review_title: I had heard Duolingo was quite good and those who had rated this app had nothing ...
text_review: I can speak five languages and wanted this app to teach a friend, I had heard Duolingo was quite good and those who had rated this app had nothing but praise. So I was shocked at what I saw. For a start this app was very dictatorial, it uses games to teach, the problem is these games introduce articles of grammar in its question which it has not yet taught you. So in affect you keep getting the question wrong because the new learner has not yet learned what it is asking. secondly It does not teach the usual way of learning basic people introducing each in every day conversation. Instead it dives straight into list of words detached from everyday communication and conversation. Plus it had no repeat slowly or pronunciation guide, it just throws words at you pronounced so fast you don't understand what was said and you can not go back to a question. Don't buy it shop around, there are better ways to learn.

review_title: I wish you offered Scottish Gaelic!
text_review: I love how this is set up.  It really throws you right in from the start.  There is no English at all (at least not that I have found yet).  It would be nice to have some instruction as to what they're asking you to do in the program.  ie:  "I'm going to say a word, match it to the picture it corresponds with."  -So it takes me a second on each part of the lesson, not only to learn the Irish words, but also learn what Rosetta Stone is asking you to do on each page.  Maybe this is part of the lesson?Wish you offered Scottish Gaelic.  I'm learning Irish because you don't have Scottish, which are not at all similar to each other like one would think.

Before I even got a chance to review this product I was hounded by the company through emails to upgrade and buy. This insatiable desire for me to buy the full version was outweighed by the constant emails that kept coming by fours; each day it occurred. Hence, I cancelled the free trial.

I am trying to learn Japanese but when I found this app It just didn't make any sense on how to use it because it doesn't actually tell you what the English word is and just has pictures and sometimes you just can't guess what it would be...I'm just not sure this is the app for me...I'm pretty disappointed because of all the other great reviews and it seems I'm the only one.Disappointed because it did look pretty helpful :(

Easy to use, but to me the lessons jumped around too much of the particular lesson you are learning. It goes from translation to a new set of words etc instead of being linear. Example, learning numbers goes from say 3 to ten to seven to two to one to eight etc. That's on the first part of lesson one. I might have better luck learning mandarin from my 9 yr old daughter who is native chinese.I would give it a higher rating if it was more concise.

review_title: Terrible voice recognition software - process for language learning is for babys
text_review: I've only used the mobile app and it is not good. The voice recognition is terrible, either not picking up the voice or not registering properly. The overall design of the mobile app is also very crude. On the concept, I found the language learning part very 'baby' like, ie not providing much context (at all) assuming you learn by repeating sentences or words. That is a matter of preference what model you prefer for language learning. My biggest issue is the lack of proper design thinking and software quality for the mobile app

I love TED TV. I am not much of a TV watcher, but I will watch the TED talks. The ones I have watched were very good and did not last too long. A much better way to spend time instead of any of the prime time dribble on regular TV.

review_title: The greatest presentations about any topic but Amazon apps buffers a lot
text_review: I love TED and there is virtually always a topic discussed by an expert that will not appeals to you. The only problem is that the Fire TV and Fire Stick apps buffer a lot. By contrast the app inside Kodi (formely XBMC) on the same Fire TV and Stick works flawlessly.There has been problems before with the Amazon apps for Netflix and others so I hope they fine tune TED too.

I am visiting Italy this fall and thought I would try and learn a lttle  bit of the lanuage. The aps good for a free app. It loaded and works well on an original Kindle Fire. The lessons are basic with,  but no theory about usage is given until you make an error. Then you need to remember the error vs being taught the correct use from the beginning. Otherwise a good basic free introduction to a language. Also it sends yours a daily reminder to keep you interested.

review_title: Would be great if app worked
text_review: I have DL on IOS and it is great! Unfortunately, that did not translate over to Fire OS. Upon signing in and selecting a language, it logs me off and returns to sign in screen. Looking through reviews, I am not the only one to encounter this. Running Fire OS 5.6.1.0 as of 5/23/18 Developer please fix! Love the app on IOS but would like to be able to use on Fire to save my phone battery!

I absolutely love this app, I have used it so much!! I have learnt Arabic, Italian, French, German, Spanish and I am currently learning Russian! Thank so this app I now know over seven languages! Definitely recommended by me. However It can get boring after a while! But otherwise, it is perfect

review_title: No Japanese, not ever language is available.
text_review: I downloaded this because it came up when I searched "learn Japanese". A friend of mine is able to use the mobile version of this to learn Japanese so I thought my kindle could do the same. Unfortunately there was no Japanese to be learned on this app. (at the time of reviewing this 8/16/2017) It's a good thing I didn't spend any money on this because I deleted it less than five minutes after getting it.I am willing to change my rating if the app company adds a description as to what languages can be learned so people know before downloading.

Sadly Duolingo haven't updated this app for over two years and it has now stopped working on my Kindle Fire, I can no longer log in. My 9 year son had made excellent progress with his Italian thanks to the app, now he's devastated because he can't access it any more. He can't have the Google Play version because Amazon doesn't allow Google apps to run on child profiles, so he'll just have to stop practising. Not sure why this version is still being made available for download when it's no longer supported. Update it or remove it!

review_title: Rosetta Stone is my favorite. This is my first experience with an ancient ...
text_review: Have RS 5 modern languages and just added Latin.  Although I use other language learning systems, as well, Rosetta Stone is my favorite.  This is my first experience with an ancient language.  Have not started it yet, but expect it to be fun.  Had 2 years of Latin in high school many years ago and, honestly, my little bit of Latin helps me greatly not only with my English grammar and usage but also with my French, Spanish, and Italian.  Even German and Dutch have some Latin cognates.

I recently enrolled in a Rosetta Stone Total-e course and wanted to be able to complete lessons without being tied to the computer.  This app works seamlessly on my Kindle Fire HD.  The built in microphone works great with the voice recognition portion of the lessons, and movement through the lessons is the same as it is on your online course.  While you get access to your lessons with this app, it doesn't contain the other online only features of your lessons (games, chat, etc.).  One still has to use their computer or laptop for these. Overall, I am very pleased with this app as a supplement to my online learning. Bonne chance!

This is a very very good app, but there is an issue which drives me crazy. In the tests it is too specific in the answers required. For example it asks for a translation of "o quarto" which to any Portuguese person is "the bedroom" but the test fails you because it was looking for "the room"Then is asks for "the youth" easy I thought "o jovem" and was failed for not putting the plural. The youth is plural or singular in English.This app is very good but it is ruined by its being too pedantic.

Now don't get me wrong. This is a great teaching app, and most of the time I don't have a problem with it. It does however have little annoyances that need to be addressed. Some of the translators for the 'speak and type what you heard' entries speak HORRIBLY, and are very difficult to hear even when you hit the 'Slowly' button and the speaker breaks down the sentence. I took 2 years of German in high school and just WASHED OUT of Duolingo's German placement test, largely due to the fact that the translator sounds like she has gum in her mouth!!!! 😈😈😈😈 Additionally, I found the Irish language translator it too quiet to hear even with my Kindle at maximum volume!! Please address these issues.

If you are in love with the new EDUCATIONAL Renaissance.(BE ADVISED: Yes there is a renaissance going on right now! if you did not know that WAKE UP! There are free courses every where! Even YALE has open courses now. There is nothing outside of your reach. EXPAND YOUR MIND!) Ok, enough preaching, just check out TED TALKS! Created for the OPEN MIND that is full of curiosity about everything from sexuality to the FABRIC OF THE UNIVERSE with a SHORT  ity-bity ATTENTION SPAN! You'll love it and you will learn so much in a few little minutes. Plus you can down load it on your kindle or Fire phone For Free! I highly recommend this app.

The video content is nice but the technical aspects of this app are terrible. First, the app is INCREDIBLY slow. This spans across many devices and networks. Very disappointing. Plus you are terrified of accidentally hitting the wrong button and having to do a process all over again. The "save your place" function is lacking. Sometimes when I come back to the app I get back to the place I paused the video. Other times I'll maybe get to the show's splash page with my episode progress unsaved. Other times it's like the first time opening the app all over again - no saved searches and my progress is wiped out. The app has potential but is currently lacking.

Terrific app for saving recipes from the Internet. Most import easily and those that don't import flawlessly can be quickly edited so they appear correctly the next time you use the recipe. Really, I have no significant gripes. Occasionally the app force closes or is a bit buggy, but that gets better with each update. I use it on a kindle fire and recommend this app to my friends that enjoy cooking.

If I could do zero stars I would  cause this app is USELESS unless you pay money.  All you can do with the free version is save 100 recipes.  Anything else you have to pay for.  Which should be stated in the description.  So NOPE!!!!!!  IF YOU CAN'T BE TRUTHFUL THEN YOU CAN KEEP YOUR APP!!!!

This app is fantastic for collecting recipes. So easy to use. Great in the kitchen without the need for several recipe cards or papers cluttering your work area. Find whatever recipes you want and simply share the page with chef tap. You can organize your recipes how you want. It is like writing your OWN cookbook. Awesome app!

review_title: Excellent for trying new recipes and saving old favorites
text_review: Overall ChefTap does a good job of importing recipes, and there are frequent updates to address problems reported to the developer. Importing, changing, labeling, and searching recipes are easy. When I'm on my laptop and find recipes I want to try, I email the links to my Kindle Fire so that I can import them into ChefTap. It has become my favorite cookbook.

review_title: disappointed with the need to upgrade
text_review: I have used ChefTap exclusively for my recipes over the last year and it was totally great until recently they upgraded it and want to charge me $11.99 a year to add more recipes. I don't mind paying a one time fee but will not pay a yearly fee. I've started my search for an alternative recipe app but am sad because I have all my recipes in their program.

review_title: Fun and Easy to use on my Kindle Fire
text_review: I have had no problems with this app on my Kindle Fire. Every recipe has photos. There are hundreds of recipes to choose from either by category or chef. I am not sure why other kindle users are reporting problems.  I agree this is a very basic app but if you enjoy cooking I highly recommend the Food Network App.

I use this app a lot. I love being able to find a recipe online and be able to hit share and have it sent to my Chef Tap. So far everything has gone really easy with this app. I will check out other apps made by this developer. Thank you. Keep up the good work.

I work out in the middle of nowhere without internet access. I needed some sort of recipe app that allowed me to download recipes from online so I could access them offline. ChefTap not only allows me to do this, but also allows me to type in my own recipes and save them! I love this app and highly recommend it!

This app is easy to use and one place to store, review,sort. add and adjust your recipes. Great photos and many ways to manipulate recipes.Select & separate out  recipes you plan to make, personalize tags, easily share favorites.  Importing from web is just a click away.  Each upgrade is better & better!I use this on my Kindle Fire. Give it a try - good stuff.

I really like using this app because I can find recipes on the internet and put them into the app without any retyping.  The only problem I have run across is that the recipes sometimes just don't appear when it has finished downloading.  I simply try again and it usually works the second time.  I'm sure there are a lot of little things that could make it better but overall it is a very handy app which works pretty well.

review_title: I got an email to remind me to review this, but it's actually my 7 year old that is riveted with it
text_review: Amazon sent me an email to review this app that we use on the TV, but it's actually my 7 year old that is riveted by the shows on it. We've watched shows on it together, but I find him watching it even when I'm not. The fact that it keeps my 7 year old engaged is pretty amazing. 5 stars just for keeping him occupied. Not sure I will continue it when the free subscription is up though.

I really like using this app because I can find recipes on the internet and put them into the app without any retyping.  The only problem I have run across is that the recipes sometimes just don't appear when it has finished downloading.  I simply try again and it usually works the second time.  I'm sure there are a lot of little things that could make it better but overall it is a very handy app which works pretty well.

This is the first app I've tried so I have nothing to compare to but I love it. I love the fact that I can easily copy recipes to the app. Love that I can edit the recipes to remember any changes made or want to make in the future. Very easy to use.

I tried it with the online and print issues but never found a recipe that I wanted to make. I really couldn't believe that nothing appealed to me, but the second issue was the same. I guess most of the people I liked at Food Network aren't in the issues.

This app is simple to use and has excellent functionality.  It's perfect for collecting all those fantastic-looking recipes you find online.  Just share the page to the app and it "reads" to find the ingredients and instructions then imports them to the app where your can access them offline.  There's a editing feature if the app misreads a recipe.  You can set up your own categories to organize your collection.  It's well-made and thoughtfully designed.  It has been working nearly flawlessly and I recommend it highly without reservation.

review_title: formally my go to cooking app.
text_review: this used to be my number one cooking app when looking for recipes, until the. ads and upgrade demands started.as of 12/8/13 they app makers are looking for 11.99 a year, or you are limited in how many recipes you can save. I understand that they are looking to make a profit, but 11.99 is a lot of money for an app.

This is a mixed review.  Got the app for free and used it for several months.  It does a pretty good job of extracting recipes from websites.  Nor perfect, but still quite useful.Then came the rub-- when I got to 100 recipes I got a message that I needed to upgrade to ChefTap Pro to load any more.  The price?  $12  a year!  I don't see anything about that in the description in the Amazon Store.  The app does allow you to download your recipes as a text file, so at least I can move them elsewhere.  Still they should have been more transparent.

I like the ideas but the recipe box feature shuts app down, I have registered for that feature but it doesn't work. No one to go to for help. So only getting a small amount of the recipes. The portion that is more inclusive of all recipes format doesn't sync well as a Mobil app.

If you cook at all get this app now.  I got the kindle fire for christmas and i have started to cook because of this app + pulse + outofmilk.  Store recipies directly to the app from websites / import recipe boxes from some sites (most of the time you will have to make some fixes to what gets imported but i dont find it a problem).

review_title: THE best recipe clipper by far!!!
text_review: This is by far THE best recipe app out there. I have tried and uninstalled many apps to capture recipes from online. Not one of them, until this one has done so with a usable result. The closest I have seen is Pocket, which I still like very much for other articles, but not for recipes. With that one I would usually end up using the web view which takes away the recipe card aspect of the app.Mindframe Design has done a wonderful job with ChefTap. I can clip my grain free and raw recipes from the web, pick the picture I want to use, edit or change an ingredient or instruction effortlessly, change the recipe title and more. If anything is missing, it is easy to retrieve missing text and fix it, but this has only happened twice out of 78 recipes that I now have in the app.I love the ability to tag and then search, or choose a tag to see the recipes with that tag and also mark recipes as favorites.I also like the way you can mark the ones you want to make and just pull those recipes up.I use this app on my Fire Phone and on my Samsung Galaxy Tablet.I have not noticed anything that I don't like about this app yet.

When I opened the app it came up with a message, something about how I liked the app.  Since I hadn't looked at it yet I couldn't say.  After I looked at the app and can see it has some glitches I could no longer get the "what did I think of the app".  When I tried to access a recipe that was offered from the recipe picture pages a different recipe would come up - not the one I asked to see.  After doing this numerous times with various recipes pictured I have determined that this definitely "Needs some work".  Maybe it can stay on my apps, but I don't know if I'll bother using it it I can't access a particular recipe.  And, thanks for putting the How do you like this app feature upon the first opening of the app.  How did I know that it doesn't exactly work as advertised.  Not impressed.  Also, don't like the new Foodnetwork style.  Printing is WAY too big.  Like I don't need to use 1/4 page of a piece of paper for the title of the recipe only.  That, with all the "competition cooking" shows, and I'm about to write Foodnetwork off of my radar.

This a great app for anyone who likes cooking. It has many recipes from the Food Network shows, making it easy use them without the need to write down ingredients or directions. The recipes can be filtered by chef if you have a favorite. There is a recipe box to store your favorite recipes and a option to create a shopping list from the recipes.

Love this app. I have the premium and I have over a thousand recipes saved. It lets me categorize them so they are easy to find. I clip most of my recipes and for the most part it works wonderfully.  I also am on my third tablet and I love that it is easy to transfer your account to the new device. I definitely recommend this app.

This app would be awesome if it actually worked. No wonder it's free now, I paid $1·99 for it! Every time I try to add something to my recipe box I get force stop. Every time I click on a chef face all I get is black screen. Very frustrating, and really needs a kindle fire update to fix these bugs. So now I'm off to open the laptop and add some recipes to my recipe box....Grrrrrrrrrr!!!!!

I love being able to move recipes from magazines, websites, etc and with one click put it on my kindle fire.  I can't believe how easy it is. I even typed a few handwritten recipes in.  Cant wait til I can save them all to the cloud. Thanks Tap Chef.

this is a good app.  the only suggestion I would make is...pictures, pictures, pictures!  recipe app creators need to realize that pictures are arguably more important than the recipe itself.  a lot of people (me included) won't even look at a recipe if there is no picture with it.  The good people at Food Network should have no problem finding plenty of pictures to go along with their recipes.

review_title: Food Network is a Must Have
text_review: Food Network for my Kindle has been one of my favorite purchases.  Recipes at my fingertips.  My favorite chefs at my fingertips.How-to videos at my fingertips.  I am not a great cook so being able to have these ideas, how-to's, and videos at my fingertips has been great.  I do not have an i-phone or smart phone but I do have a Kindle Fire which works really well for me.  By all means get this app for you phone or for your Kindle...........you will enjoy everything available.

I love this app.  I love the fact that I can copy a recipe from a website and then find it when there's no internet available.  I use it at our camper often.  I would like it to be a little easier to title/organize the categories and find them a little quicker.  But overall, this is an excellent application.

review_title: love it use all the time
text_review: I love this app it is my only go to recipe app and was probably the fourth one I found being unhappy with all the others. its easy to share right from the web controls are spot on and just an all around great app so get it I am sure you wont be disappointed

The app has stopped working.  When I try to update, I get a message about "parsing" issues.  When I try to share a recipe, it forces close.  I used to love this app.  :(Updated July, 2015: They fixed it! It is now one of my favorite apps. I like the fact that it doesn't "sleep" when in use. No need to touch your device with dirty hands. I use it on my Galaxy Note 4...Further update September 2015, I may actually consider the pro version if it wasn't so expensive.  Even at 25% off for the first year, it seems a little pricey.  We'll see. I may need to bite the bullet...Five years later... I did consider the pro version and I absolutely love it! Unlimited recipes and I don't have to scroll through an entire life story. Just clip the recipe and you're done. Renews automatically every year. Well worth the roughly $20 a year.

review_title: love food network but not this app!!!!
text_review: I have installed and uninstalled this app three times.  Whenever I click on a chef I get the error "app has stopped"  is anyone else having this problem?  When I installed it the first time it worked like a charm. After a couple of months it stopped working.  Please fix the problem.....

I love Food Network.... I love Food Network Magazine... This is really not either.At first glance this seems to be a good app. Upon further use... I am less than impressed and a little disappointed. I rarely even look at it any more and don't know if I will anytime soon.

I love love love this app! Previous to finding ChefTap, I had hundreds of internet bookmarks for recipes I wanted to try. ChefTap gathered them all up and they are in one convenient virtual cookbook of recipes that I know i love. If I make changes, no problem..changed right there. If I decide I don't like one after I try it...delete! It's very user friendly and super convenient. I have the free registered account. May be bumping up to pro! If you like to treasure hunt recipes, this app is a must!

review_title: would be better if all recipes had pictures
text_review: The app is good, good you can search by your favorite chef but many of the recipes do not show you a picture of what the dish will look like. I like that it gives you the most recent, most popular and newsy receptors and their is a search function.

It's easy to find recipes either by chef or by ingredient, if you look by ingredient you will get all recipes with that ingredient.  If you have an idea where you saw a recipe you can search by chef's name and those lists are much shorter.  It's great for finding recipes, my only problem is that I bought it to use on my Kindle Fire, and it's a little balk-y.  I will get bounced out at times for no apparent reason, or it will freeze up on me, especially when I'm scanning a very long list of recipes.  I don't know if it's the Kindle or the site that causes this.  I also have this happen with All Recipes, but never with Epicurious.  But I like the Food Network site because I can find recipes by Ina Garten, who's style I really like, and I don't see her represented in other recipe sites.

I bought this app in the hopes of getting some creative ideas for meal making.  So far, I haven't made many recipes because I find most of them interesting but not compelling.  I do like the fact that there are many chefs who contribute to the app's recipe collections, giving the user a wide variety of tastes and approaches.  I also like that most of the recipes are considered "easy" although that's really a relative term when it comes to us nonprofessional cooks. The app has improved in that it categorizes recipes both by chef and by topic (category of food), and the photos are good.  I'd like to see a few more challenging recipes with some "how to's" included, maybe with some videos. I do find the recipes more family friendly than, say, Bon Apetit recipes.  And of course fans of The Food Network will find their favorite chefs represented here. The app is frequently update with "recent" recipe contributions.

review_title: Most of the app is not free
text_review: The app says you get a year free but after a week most of the app became accessible only if you were a "premium member" (willing to pay them money for access to older episodes or classes)which seems incredibly dishonest. I already pay for food network through my satellite TV provider I WILL NOT be paying more to view older episodes, Hades will freeze over first.

review_title: Not easy to use or read
text_review: I find this app very difficult to use. Why would you put white boxes on a white background?? Both the search box and the highlight for navigation are white, and the app’s background is mostly white. And the titles on all the recipes in a search result are in a small font. This is for Firetv, you have to be able to read them from a distance. Poor

review_title: Having a difficult time trying to figure this app out
text_review: I just downloaded this app into my Kindle Fire HD.  I was so excited.  I went to Foodnetwork and imported a bunch of recipes that I use all the time.  My problem comes with trying to figure out how to use this app. It seems I can never find "home" when I need it and made categories, but can't seem to figure out how to get my recipes into those categories.  Right now I am frustrated, but hopefully with some time, I will figure it all out.  I have also, during importing recipes, gotten the "black screen of death" twice and also when viewing my recipes in the app, got the "black screen" twice.  I realize this program has a way to go to improve and I hope I can hang in long enough to see that day.  Right now, I love the "idea" of this app but don't "like" it.  LOL1/7/13 - Well, I played around alot with this app yesterday and am feeling more comfortable with it.  I still feel like it is clunky and not overly user-friendly, but am liking it more and more.  I really love the idea of not printing out so many recipes from Foodnetwork, and other places.  Now, I am giving it a "4 star" rating.

There's several objectives going on at the same time. The beautiful good woman leading her people to rebuild their city out of ruins. Then you have bad magician working against them. A few different types of matching 3's. It's very tempting to buy energy so you can continue to play. Graphics are great. It's a clean game for all ages but it's one the top best that adults can get into.

review_title: Don't need to buy to play
text_review: I'm one of those people who, if it weren't for bad luck, I wouldn't have any luck at all,,and I still find this game enjoyable.  I enjoy the graphics and that you can repeat levels over and over and the score is cumulative so I can eventually get the necessary stars to level up.  I would have given it 5 stars except for the friends bit.  I almost never go on Facebook, nor do my friends. Got to be a  better way to get friends.

Even though game is free, you don’t get very far w/o having to buy moves or you have to start over.  Very annoying. I suppose after a person gets better this wouldn’t be the case but until then, get your wallet out.  Maybe I don’t understand the game yet either.

review_title: Basic Match 3 with added City building challenge!!!!
text_review: I've only been playing this game a couple of hours and so far, it's really good. It's basically just like any other Match 3 game with the added challenge of rebuilding a city.You get coins and other resources that have to be spent wisely to rebuild the various parts of the city.Just like other Match 3 games, you use energy for each puzzle that you solve but the energy replenishes over time.All in all, a good game considering the Match 3 gameplay. So far, I'm having fun and...we'll just see how far I can get!!!

I love this game very addictive.  I haven't had to pay money to get through this game it's great . I LOVE that it's a match 3 game and build your own city so to speak.  I can't put it.  The only thing I would do differently is make it so the gold you win in the game you could use it to buy boosts and energy so I could play longer.

Pretty typical match 3 game.  Great graphics, nice little story line to follow.  Seems to run slow at times on my Kindle, have to press on some items multiple times before they register.  I'd give this more stars but...it's absolutely maddening to play a game where you need to complete a level to find an item to progress (spending energy on each level of course until you run out and have to wait to play or buy it with real money) and then you finish the level and don't obtain the item you needed.  This has happened multiple times to me, and I've had to play certain boards even 3 times to get some items which is absurd.  If you successfully finish a board, you should always find the item that's supposed to be there!This game mechanic is basically a way to make you waste your energy in an attempt to get you to spend $$ to buy more and keep playing.  I'm all for throwing a bit of cash towards app developers that make a good game and entertain me, but I'm not going to pay for something when it's frustrating to play and it feels like the app is set up as a cash grab.  So while it's not a bad game and you can play for a little while with breaks in between if you don't want to spend money, be aware that once you get past the first 4-5 levels and each board starts costing more energy to play, it becomes less fun when you have to keep repeating those boards.  I'm also not a fan of match 3 games with levels that you have to complete in a set number of moves, they always get to the point where you never have enough moves to win unless you get lucky.  I'd rather play a game with timed boards any day.

The graphics are lovely and the play smooth.  I am giving it 5 stars because the matching is pretty much what I like in a match game and the town building a nice touch, however I would much prefer a buy option for the game than in app purchasing. So far I only ran into one instance of having to buy, but it does not seem I cannot progress without it. If that becomes different I will probably stop playing. I do not mind paying for a game but I dislike being forced into app purchases.As for the energy others mentioned, if you just go do something else for a while it does regenerate on its own.

review_title: Don't download unless you are willing to spend serious money
text_review: The game is great when getting though the matching process but like most games of this nature players are nickel and dime to death to keep progressing.  I was very sad,  I truly enjoyed the game until I recognized exactly how much it was costing me.  I wish Amazon would bring back the underground

This is a decent match-3 game. Good graphics, enjoyable music, and an interesting storyline. Sometimes it gets a bit buggy. Loading errors are common. It can take multiple wins on a given screen to actually gain the prize you are supposed to receive for completion, so be prepared to grind. Sometimes you get items before you even have a quest for them, which can be frustrating, because when you get the quest you'll have to repeat the level and win it again, and like I said you don't often get it on the first try.

Fun game! Lots of good puzzles. I wish that there was a set of instructions and rules available somewhere. I am an older player and didn't realize that to earn wood, I needed to go to the hut puzzles. Young people seem to know that this information, but older folks are clueless. More info would increase our enjoyment and reduce frustration.

I love Awem developers and the Cradle games, but this one I wasn't fond of at all.  I wish it was  PC computer compatible instead of having to play it on my Kindle Fire.  I was not able to find a way out of the game without turning everything off.  There was no "exit" anywhere that I could see.  Also, when you close the game,  your progress is not saved.

Can't play long enough without purchasing gems.  Also once you get the three stars you shouls win the artifact.  Some levels you need to play numerous tims tp getting the required artifact.  Need to build ship, but you have to play so many times it ends up being ridiculous.  I have had 5 ready to complete but can't get the missing easily unless you buy.

I really love this game but there is not enough time. It takes so long for the time to count back up. Then time is up and I have to wait forever for it to refill . Plus evertim e I start my game is says there is an error.It is kinda long and monotonous too. Otherwise it can be fun.

This game is a great way to pass time but I find some of it confusing.  The use of some items in the inventory for example, otherwise it's fun and different from most of the other games out there. Its a combination of games like candy crush and others where you build your own city. Overall, a great way to pass time!

I have really enjoyed this game, this is a nice change of pace with match 3, building, and adventure in one game. The main problem is running out of energy after completing a few levels and you having to purchase the resources if you  want to continue on. That's the main reason for not rating it higher.

Decent graphics, and so far, Lvl 10, no timed boards. I play to relax, and I hate timed boards. Negative note, there is already a task FORCING me to buy game tokens with real money. NO. This was advertised as a FREE game. I will no be spending money on the game and will delete if these things continue. Also, the game is slow to replace energy, though I don't understand why there is an energy requirement anyway. Shouldn't the devs WANT people to get hooked and play long sessions. Again, if this becomes too annoying, I will delete.

They trail you along you make a purchase them they hold you at one thing after after you use up the stupid gem they use for moneyTell me after doing the puzzle 9 time and always ending up with just one piece to win  sort of becomes like it's planned that way of course if o oh I'd by more green gelato oH my way out  come on you molesters if your going to cheat your customers doing more sneaky then haveingbthennhangv9 times in a row needing only 1 file left on the same game9 times this gAme is not even half fun

I have also been playing for over a year and I get so mad that you have to go through a level a million times before getting the items to complete collections. Somehow I still love the game. I think I persist because I just won't let it beat me and I really curious to see what's coming up next. Please, please fix this issue before it becomes a lost cause.

The game concept is good and addictyive.....the only issue I am having is with thgthge mechanics....I find I have to press really hard or repeatedly to advance....I don't knoiknoiw if it is the game or my Fire Tablet....but I do not seem to have this issue with any other game/app.

I HATE that more than 90% of the time you DON'T win/find the object you're after. I have finished an entire building looking for one item, salt shaker recently, and NEVER get one. IMO, a ploy to make people spend money to buy the items. Don't mind that occasionally, but also the prices for those items are ridiculous!Overall I love the game and will keep playing, at least for a while.

I've been playing this game for about 9 months.  Thought it was fun so kept playing.  I refuse to pay actual money for the gems so reading the reviews inspired me to quit this game as the farther along you go, the more you'll need to pay actual money to continue.  But my biggest concern is my inability to shut down my brain when I go to bed.  I see the moves jumping around in my head and have a really hard time falling asleep.  I bought blue-light reducing glasses to help with this problem but didn't appear to help much.  So I decided to quit playing the game.  It's been about 2 weeks now that I haven't played the game, and I am finally able to fall asleep the way I used to prior to playing this game.  I'm wondering if it's all similar games and not just Cradle of Empires.  Anyone else having this problem?  My sleep is more important than playing a game so no more games for me.  I'm going to go to the library and loan out actual books instead.

I have to say I am totally surprised by how much fun I have playing this game! It's not so easy that you get bored and it does have some challenges to it. I play it until I'm completely out of energy. I recommend this game to anyone who wants to have fun playing a game you can enjoy... I'm editing my review because with all of the new things that they have added now the game really is FUN.....

Great game that is free and good to pass time. If you are patient and allow your energy to refill in its own time. This is a different take on a match three game. You see hidden object games in this style but this is the first match three of this type I have found and I hope to see more.

review_title: Lots of variety to the puzzles
text_review: I like the variety of the puzzles. You can pretty much relax and play the game however you want, regarding if you want to actively build up the city and get new puzzles or not. I find it rather relaxing (except for the timed puzzles). It did take me awhile to build the ship, but I admit I wasn't trying very hard. There are different events that happen where you can spend your resources to play instead of energy. I've never been able to actually complete an event yet, but they are a nice diversion. I actually like having a limit on my energy, or I might spend more time playing the game and not getting anything done in real life! It can be a challenge with a bit of luck involved with how the pieces dropped, but it's not as difficult as Homescapes and overall much more enjoyable!

This game is very easy to build a town, it is very challenging,with the puzzles that you have to complete as you climb up the levels,just like most games,they do get tougher.I enjoy it so much,that I play this before Fashion Story AND after pUzzles and DRAGONS.  NEED TO LET THE LEVELS LAST LONGER, and STOP making it where every level of a puzzle,it runs out to fast where you use all your gems, and then u have to buy more just to get OUT OF THAT LEVEL.  THATS NOT REALLY FUN OR FAIRIF THINGS ARENT FIXED LIKE THAT,I WILL UNI STALL THIS GAMEIM NOT GOING TO KEEP SPENDING MY MONEY ON. GEMS..SO NOT COOL... IM JUST SAYING FOR THE YOU G KIDS THAT PLAY THIS GAME, ITS TOO EASY TO GRAB A CREDIT CARD FROM PARENTS AND SPEND MONEY ON GEMSN THINGSOTHER THAN THAT, I GIVE THE GAME LAYOUT 5stars.Thankyou and good day

At first it seemed unique and it is in a way but i kept expecting something more to happen. However, after playing for a few days i found myself bored. Games tgat have been around forever like candy crush which appear to have far less to them, held my interest longer. Cant really explain what it needs but it needs something. Also, the loading times for levels are terrible.

For a while I thought I had found a game where you could actually play for free and get some progression. Silly me.  Had a five day event where you earned crystals and if you reached 160 you'd get to keep however many you earned. Reached 160 two days before end of event and game said I could pay $11.99 to get the bank early. Event ended late last night so logged in today and got a message I could buy the 200+ crystals I had earned for $11.99. Slick. Obviously this is only going to get worse.

I've had the game for a while and until recently my main complaint was that it didn't update enough so the game didn't grow. I no longer have that complaint so I can now honestly give the game 5 stars. Another reviewer complained that it is hard to earn all five items to complete a collection. I agree but I find that most of my problems are more due to my not searching for the collection items in the order recommended by the game. I've been more concerned with earning the rewards that comes from collecting all the stars within a house than  collecting collection items. But I think that that's the beauty of this game. You see because each person has a different strategy for working the game every person ends up playing a different version of the game. It's frustrating when I'm close but don't complete the puzzles correctly. I hate using the outside aids. But when one puzzle annoys me I either try another puzzle or another house. The games a great indicator of how I'm feeling during a day also. If I keep making careless mistake it means my concentration is shot. I truly enjoy the challenges this game provides.

Now, this is not a game that I would personally play again.  I am legally blind and wanted something easy and easy to follow.  Trying to follow the graphics when pops ups happen all over the screen is difficult for me, and I also felt like I was missing something as well.  So I stopped playing.I am sure other people might enjoy and have some fun with it, but I just didn't."

Game is crashing after Aug 9 update. DO NOT REINSTALL or you will lose all progress. Go to Awem games site and enter a help ticket.  They are working on the bug.  I have loved this game and played for more than a year. I hope there is a fix soon.

review_title: Great game with a lot of variety!
text_review: Fun and addictive.  Takes lots of patience to advance in certain areas like the ship or finishing collections without spending money but if you stick to it you can.  Great game for logical thinkers and gets harder as you advance.  My tips would be to watch for patterns as items fall when making moves, think at least 2 steps ahead and do not automatically make the move they suggest because it is not the best move.  Have fun!

I am totally addicted to this game. I have played many match 3 games, but this is by far the most challenging and intriguing. Still working on speed for the timed boards. Really don't know how to get past the whole blitz mode so that's a little frustrating. But I will Not give up! Looking forward to many, MANY more hours of fun. Not much sleep, but lots of fun.

review_title: Great at the beginning but leads to frustration
text_review: The game is beautiful and starts off easy enough but items needed to complete quest aren't granted even when all stars for level are earned. This is true for all collection items. If you want to advance you have to pay. After a while the thrill of earning and finding items leaves and the game becomes too dull. This is the second time I've installed game, played for a bit, removed game, and started over from the beginning. It's the only pleasurable part.

I'm really enjoying this game. I thought I would play it not like it and install it. Well I was very wrong. It's 1:22 in the morning and I think I've been playing it for over an hour. I plan on still playing it until at least 3 in the morning.Thank youCarrie reilly

I enjoy the puzzles however moving up, opening new territory, and gaining bonuses are so difficult because it isn't clear how long it takes to get tokens  I've been playing for months and still haven't achieved many steps up.  Clearly built to encourage in April purchases but progress is so tedious it discourages them

I really like the game. Challenging and fun. Only two problems I can think of are: 1. Items sometimes take ten or more times searching for to find. 2. Yes, you get more energy when you level up, but the puzzles take more energy also, so you really do not get to do more.

While the game can be interesting at times the most frustrating thing is how slow the progress in leveling up. Although I enjoy most puzzles I have a love hate relationship with night mode. I can not stand the spotlight you have to move around. I don't like how complicated and the number of moves it takes with the ropes etc. Time and Blitz Time puzzles need to be improved. Overall it remains an enjoyable play experience.

I do not have Cradle of Empires on my Kindle, nor do I want to install it. I absolutely HATE its annoying pop-ups everytime I click on 'Start a new game' from my Solitaire app. Sometimes it takes 15-20 taps to get rid of it....just for that reason I'd never install it!

I like the game hate the manipulation.  Most of what you need is found at a timed game.  Even using the dice to change the more it either doesn't change the one you want or changes it for one round only. It also seems like you can't win without spending money.  Like the "deck" is stacked against you, sometimes.  Other than that I really kind of enjoy it.

review_title: I am not happy with this issue.
text_review: As of today 8/8/2018, I am still having problems with this app. I have contacted same about this and have received nothing. I just purchased a starter pack from Amazon for this game. I played a few games this morning, went to another screen and now I can't get into the app. This is the only app this is happening to. I go to the icon and click, it brings up same cover page for a few seconds and then goes black. I have lost all my activity and gems and lives for this game.

Upon INSTALLATION, I it found 5 viruses and plenty of residual trash files. It cleaned them up fast and allowed me to review what was cleaned or removed. Best part is, this app is lightweight, not all that extra nonsense you get with a lot of the others I've tried.

This is without doubt the best app to monitor YOUR OWN webcams. It can of course connect to any public streaming webcam but that is just a bi-product of having such a flexible app.In order to use it successfully so you can view from within your home or from anywhere outside your home when you are connected to data or wifi you need.....1 - a webcam (or webcams) connection to your own network (lan or wifi connected)2 - set up port forwarding on your home router3 - either pay your internet provider for a fixed IP address for your home network OR subscribe to a free DNS service  (like noip.com)Then load this app, or the free version, and put in your webcam parameters. Don't forget to put the app on your android phone also.It's not difficult - jfgi!

I installed this because my fire was running kinda funky. It is the 3rd app I have tried and this one is the best so far. I did have to pay $4.44 for the cleaning side of the app. My fire runs much better but I have run 2 scans so far and each time there is 8 virus files I click to see what they are, it will not show me but says clean garbage, I do so and it says it is clean. I give 3 stars because I am still unsure it is finding and getting rid of viruses.

Used tiny cam monitor free for maybe 1.5 months and was happy with it for monitoring my wifi camera- all Trendnet and one Foscam. The Free version worked fine for my needs except for the adds popping up. Like being able to have multiple cameras on one page. Decided to go to the Pro version to support the app- $4 is worth it and then there are no worries about accidentally hitting the app banner. Had all my cameras listed during set-up. It also allowed me to transfer the camera setup easily from the free version to the pro version. I have 2 pages of cameras and it is set up to stay on each page for 10 seconds before going to the 2nd page. You probably will want to remove all of the public cameras that come installed with the app.

Have cleaned my Kindle Fire Tablet numerous times per week since installing this software.  Results appear to be mixed, at times programs appear to run smoothly and other times there doesn't appear to be any changes.  When there are no noticeable changes some programs with won't run or they run slow.  Unknown if the problem is the Kindle Fire, software installed, internet or all of the above.

review_title: Great software to view your IP cameras
text_review: I started with the Free version then paid to get the Pro version, since it included sound (it was only two bucks then)It works great.  I have two Foscam wireless webcams and use this software on my Kindle Fire HD. I can easily view the cameras from inside my home network or any wireless connection outside my home.It opens quick, will show both cameras at once (or individually).  You can listen and talk through it (though talking is poor, likely due to wireless connection).It also enables a lot of the camera features like alarms and email/video recording.

review_title: Full featured app with excellent support - wyze cam v2 on firestick
text_review: Still trying to iron somethings out though so defaulting to sideloaded wyze app just to be honest. I’m getting trails on moving objects but when I email support for help they get back very quick. Trying some suggestions from them and will report back. I’d give it a try. I had to buy a bluetooth mouse to get the wyze app sideloaded and it’s not perfect either. It maybe integration with wyze so if you have other cameras default settings may work out of the box. Bluetooth mouse cost me $23. App is much cheaper.

I like this product because it is easy to use.  I am a senior and I appreciate a product that doesn't require a lot of tectie know how. I installed the product, read the information and "puff" it's working. Thank you for a great product that works, is easy to install and remembering us seniors.

Wish I could be given a list of the files and viruses being removed. I have a virus detector installed on my tablet but it did not catch the viruses this app said were on my device. And I guess I will need to run this every time I use my device because there is no automatic scan setting available.

I ran the cleaner and it showed 15 MB to be cleaned. Then my finger misfired and instead of heading here to offer a 5 Star rating, I ended up re-cleaning my Fire Tablet to access the button- link to come to the Appstore. Surprise surprise surprise it now showed 58 MB to be cleaned!! But I had just cleaned all the suggested 15 MB and now within seconds there is more! I repeated this process 8 more times, each time new amounts of MB were to be cleaned. Is this a never end and non-diminishing problem?

review_title: Keeps my Kindle 10 in. Tablet running smooth!
text_review: I have been running this app for 18 months. My tablet was not loading photos, so I ran the scan, removed the trash, and my tablet was runnI haing fine again! No other issues since installation. I like how simple and fast it is!  I have been playing for a long time. I usually buy the extra dash at 1.99 and overnight it has gone up to 13.99. Seems a little steep!

CCleaner doesn't appear to accomplish anything wirh my Fire 8, but does appear to work on my older 2nd Gen Fire 10.  Speed Booster's graphics state it's "freed up" space, but it's "result" is suspiciously repetitious.  This app seems more honest, in both posted result and Fire performance, than the others. Slightly faster and smoother performance.

I installed this because my fire was running kinda funky. It is the 3rd app I have tried and this one is the best so far. I did have to pay $4.44 for the cleaning side of the app. My fire runs much better but I have run 2 scans so far and each time there is 8 virus files I click to see what they are, it will not show me but says clean garbage, I do so and it says it is clean. I give 3 stars because I am still unsure it is finding and getting rid of viruses.

We use this as a baby monitor and it works great! I love that we can access from any phone or computer. On occasion we'll use it to monitor the house when my oldest daughter is babysitting. I love that we scan the house at different angles. It's like we're still there.

This is by far the best file & virus cleaner I have yet to find for my Amazon Kindle. The one thing that I didn't like is when you first download the app it tells you that it's free. Which couldn't be further from the truth because it will let you run the program & it'll tell you what's on your Kindle that needs to be removed. But when you go to download the virus remover it tells you that you must pay $3.99 which is fine because of how good the app work's. I just find it a bit misleading that it tells you it's free & then hits you w/ a $3.99 charge.

review_title: Keep an eye on your property from your phone, tablet and computer!
text_review: Best app Ever! I use this app all the time to watch my car and my patio door. It records images and sends them to my email. View live and it's only a spit sec. difference in time. Control your camera right from the app. We plan to add more cameras.

review_title: works great, easy to set up.
text_review: I bought this to use as a baby monitor on my kindle fire HD with my foscam 8910W cameras. The app has a camera scanner so it can get most of the details for set up on its own. Once I figured out the difficult part of port forwarding using a YouTube video or two, I'm now able to view my cameras from anywhere and I bought the app for my Android phone.Best features: control camera movement, movement and sound alarms, and viewing more than one camera at a time.

The two older TRENDNET cameras we have (TV-IP 512WN) works great on the home network and via Inernet.  We purchased two additional TRENDNET cameras (TV-IP 751WIC and TV-IP 851WIC) that are not currently supported.  We were able to use the TV-IP 551WI setting with encrypted password to view both cameras on the home network but can't view via Internet.  Would like to see support on these cameras on the next update.

review_title: The interface is clean and easy to navigate
text_review: I've tried several apps before finally deciding to use this app as my go-to app for my Foscam cameras. Camera set up is intuitive and straight forward. The interface is clean and easy to navigate. Easy to activate/deactivate the speaker/microphone on the camera as well as record video. Thanks tinyCam for a job well done. There were just way too many other apps, or few apps that do what you can in an easy user-friendly way.

review_title: If you are not a techie - stay away from these apps.
text_review: So confusing to use, I have 3 cameras on one NVR box, but it would only allow me to view one of the cameras from the box. Luckily I’ve got a monitor connected via HDMI to the NVR box so I’m not particularly fussed, but they really need to make these apps a bit simplistic.

It goes away for a while and seems to do what it is supposed to do.  Hard to tell. Tablet seems to run faster.  Very strange that none of the other virus checkers find anything but this one always does.  Also the fact that you have to rate it in order to get more features makes me wonder.  Will give it the benefit of the doubt for now and keep using it.

My family absolutely loves this camera.  We use it as a baby monitor and couldn't be happier.  The sound is very clear and picks up the faintest of sounds. My husband put it together so I'm not sure how easy that was but the general use is very easy.  The nightvision is very clear, you can even make out the pattern on her bed sheets ando pajamas. Highly recommend.

review_title: False Advertising, No Proof of changes
text_review: Product says it is a FREE OPTIMIZER & CLEANER - it is not. It does a free scan and THEN you have to pay (IN THE APP) to get the optimizer and cleaner. I was a fool and used my coins to continue... and I cannot return & refund. This is bait & switch. If people bought it through the site/store, they could get a refund when they see the app does nothing. But if you use coins, you are now stuck with a brick they claim fixed your kindle - but since it does not provide any information on what it did, you have no way of knowing.As a matter of fact, when I used my kindle to research how to get my coins back - it felt slower than ever. And please do not insult me with your generic blurb on how it removes hidden data and all that.

Has the potential to be good. Relatively easy to set up if you know the right info, but PAINFULLY SLOW. Other free apps out there that will do a better job. At first I though the CCTV feed had frozen, but coincidentally a car drove past the front of the house - it was either moving at crawling pace, or the app is unable to refresh fast enough.

review_title: I love the many options including local recording
text_review: Automatically picked up and configured my Insteon HD Cam in just a couple taps. I love the many options including local recording. I'd been trying several IP camera apps since the Insteon app is terrible with the camera (no landscape full screen view for instance). None of the other apps were as simple to use or had as many features. I love the background audio mode as I plan on using an old tablet as a baby monitor.

review_title: Scanner ONLY. You must but the cleaner.
text_review: This app is ONLY a scanner. You must purchase the actual cleaner. It runs a quick scan-but there's no way to tell how accurate it is w/o buying and running the associated cleaner. Very deceptive to call this a scanner AND cleaner. Even the description doesn't mention the reality of what this App is and isn't.

review_title: Nice App and Good Customer Support
text_review: I've been using this product for a couple years now and just bought it again for my newest phones.  The people that support this product have been really responsive in the past to my questions.  I also like to see when a company continues to improve on their software with regular updates.  You see upgrades to the app every month or two.  It gives you a good feeling that the company is planning to be around for the long haul.

This app starts out seeming great but after every scan, there are 8 viruses. (Just like everyone else said) andI just bought my fire hd 8, and I know there isn't any viruses let alone 8 and then you have to spend money to "fix& it. DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME

review_title: it works well for what I need
text_review: Just to watch my grandson when he is suppose to be taking a nap and I don't have the time or energy to run up and down the stairs to get him to lay down AGAIN and go to sleep, I can talk to him and convince him to do that for me.

It won't work with android wear watches. Which is why I purchased it. The description says it works with android wear watches. However, I get a pop-up that there is a bug with Amazon DRM protection. I don't like to give this a low reading, since it isn't the developers fault (if purchased from Google Play Store, it evidently works without a hitch). However, it still does not work as advertised.

Seems to help a bit, but it's hard to believe that I have three to five viruses each time that I cleaned my tablet. When I click the " see" title it won't show the files that are supposed to be infected. Also the promotional advertising for more of their own products are annoying.

This app started locking up my Kindle Fire so bad I had to do a hard reset, plug/unplug the power cable, then do another hard reset again just to get my Kindle to unlock and come back on. After contacting the developer multiple times, I realised he just didn't care. I have two other relatives who had the same problem, so I know it isn't just my Kindle. Actually, I have three Kindles, so that's a total of FIVE so far it won't work on. This app is a total loss, renders my Kindle unusable, and the developer is one of the worst I've dealt with on Amazon. He won't even respond to my requests for help anymore. I finally had to uninstall this app and bought "Ip cam viewer" (full) and found no problems so far with that one. Take my advice, if you have a Kindle Fire, stay away from this app. I do have to add this, the app does work well on my Nexus 7 tablet, but it does NOT WORK ON KINDLE FIRE DEVICES. If you have another kind of tablet, it is a hit or miss, try the free version first. Better yet, if you have IP cameras and want to be able to choose from a list of good monitoring apps that work, don't buy a Kindle in the first place. Buy something else that will allow purchases from the Google Playstore. There is a better selection and most likely your device will be compatible with this app. Good luck.

App appears to be working as advertised.  Finds both garbage and virus files and removes them.  However the quality of the user interface is so low that my confidence in the results is less than complete.  To be blunt, the user interface appears to be a joke.  It looks like something you would find on a game app for children.  It turns it turns me off something fierce.  It may just be me (probably is), but this shakes my confidence in the results and thus reduces the overall rating that I can give to the app.  Sorry, but I have to tell it like it is.

review_title: DO NOT BUY THIS PIECE OF JUNK!!!
text_review: I just paid for this app on my Fire TV Stick, and I'm extremely angry. When I run the app, it immediately freezes up and becomes unresponsive to inputs from the remote. Therefore, I cannot set up any cameras - in fact, I can't do ANYTHING except try to abort the app - which takes a long time to kill. So frustrating. What a piece of total garbage. I'm shocked that Amazon would even offer this app for sale. I will be attempting to get my money back. DO NOT BUY THIS!PS Aside from this tinyCam Monitor app annoyance, I'm really digging my new Fire TV Stick!

It seems like this is the best screen mirroring app available for Fire TV Stick. It works well screening my iPhone screen on Sony TV. You mirroring pictures on my phone. It can mirroring video file on my phone without sound. It does work when video within the app. Video within CNN or ESPN doesn’t play. This app is way below my expectations.

After using a popular cleaner, booster, virus scanning program for several years it occured to me that on three different tablets - and a zillion scans -not one virus had ever been detected. Upon noticing this application was designed for Kindle Fire tablets I thought I'd give it a go. On the first scan two viruses were found, cleaned, and eliminated. Today fourteen more were discovered! The process is lightning fast - no long wait. My Kindle Fire is working great.  Plus, I like the fact that this application is providing a higher level of protection for my tablet. There's a huge investment of money, time, and irreplaceable information on my tablet. It's foolish not to protect it.

The latest version regularly freezes my kindle fire and requires a reboot.  This also happens on my wife's fire and my Motorola attic (not as bad on the attic).  I have the latest foscam camera from amazon, so I assume this is should be a common setup...  This is very frustrating and unacceptable.  Do not buy the app until they release a fix.

review_title: The interface is clean and easy to navigate
text_review: I've tried several apps before finally deciding to use this app as my go-to app for my Foscam cameras. Camera set up is intuitive and straight forward. The interface is clean and easy to navigate. Easy to activate/deactivate the speaker/microphone on the camera as well as record video. Thanks tinyCam for a job well done. There were just way too many other apps, or few apps that do what you can in an easy user-friendly way.

review_title: Works so well I want to get more cameras!
text_review: Works great with my 3 Foscam Wifi P/T cameras!I tried the free version to verify that it could connect and operate my cameras, and it worked great, so I upgraded to the paid version (easy setup with the convenient export/import feature - very well thought out). The PRO features are totally worth the price.FastThis app works easily and the control/response from the camera is much faster than the app I was using on my iPhone. There is a lot of extra functionality like motion/audio detection and auto-recording and uploading. My kids like to turn the motion alarm on, and see if they can "Ninja" past the kitchen cam undetected (worth $3 right there just for the sustained silence/giggles from them!).Works on Fire StickI hadn't even thought of trying this on the Fire TV Stick until I read a few reviews here. I was really happy to see that it worked pretty well (the navigation is a little challenging, but you get used to it), and I was glad that one purchase gets me an app on 2 devices! Knowing that this works nicely on the Fire Stick opens up a bunch of possibilities for monitoring.Works great on Kindle Fire HDI can view all 3 cams at once, see/hear the motion alarm go off when there is movement, easily record, and do all the things you could imagine you would want to do in a security cam app.The Kindle Fire I have doesn't have a mic, but I read that headphones w/mic might work, and was very happy to find that my iPhone headphones work w/the Kindle, and I can talk/listen over the cameras with 'reasonable' clarity! I had pretty much given up on being able to talk over the cams, as all the apps I had tried in the past would send such garbled sound, (worse than Charlie Brown's teachers...kids look it up) and I couldn't get any mobile/desktop app to work with the Foscam 9821W talk functionality. This is the first app that lets me talk to that cam, and it works great!SecurityIt is great that SSL and encrypted password features are available, and work well, allowing you to access/control your cameras externally, but securely.The software is well designed and seems to be updated pretty frequently, as you can see from the support site: http://tinycammonitor.com/changelog.htmlNit-picks:- I wish the default view would have the movement controls- The 'preset' functions don't work for me

review_title: Better App than what I had......definitely!
text_review: I already had 2 Apps downloaded to check for viruses and to clean system......BUT I DOWNLOADED THIS JUST TO SEE WHAT IT WAS LIKE AND IT FOUND , ALL KINDS OF JUNK AND 7 viruses!  I think I will keep this App and get rid of the other ones!!!  Angelblue :)

review_title: Live tv on my amazon FireTV
text_review: One thing to note: you MUST MUST have a Hauppage cordcutter tv. This app will NOT work without it. I read all the reviews here and I was sure it wasn't going to work. But it seems as though most people here download the app and expect live tv on their FireTV.No!!! You need to have the Hauppage cordcutter too.I followed the instruction on the Hauppage site and had live TV running on my FireTV box in about 5 minutes. The one thing this is missing is playing back recordings on my TV. I called their support people and they told me that this feature is coming soon. I will take them for their word but if it does not come soon, I'm going to drop one star.I picked up a Hauppage cordcutter tv at Best buy when it was on sale for $99

App downloaded ok but upon trying to connect to my wireless router - like apparently many other folks - got stuck at 90% complete. Forced to do a hard power down of my firestick and on second try had same stupid result.  Looked on YouTube for advice but most videos don't directly address this problem, but many seem to be hawking a device which (supposedly) is needed or at least gives you a chance to use the app. Ridiculous and Amazon should boot this app out of their store.

"Follow the directions and download the Amazon Video app for laptops to download and watch your Amazon Prime movie purchases. Yeah, right... You cannot get there from anywhere. review_title: Live tv on my amazon FireTV
text_review: One thing to note: you MUST MUST have a Hauppage cordcutter tv. This app will NOT work without it. I read all the reviews here and I was sure it wasn't going to work. But it seems as though most people here download the app and expect live tv on their FireTV.No!!! You need to have the Hauppage cordcutter too.I followed the instruction on the Hauppage site and had live TV running on my FireTV box in about 5 minutes. The one thing this is missing is playing back recordings on my TV. I called their support people and they told me that this feature is coming soon. I will take them for their word but if it does not come soon, I'm going to drop one star.I picked up a Hauppage cordcutter tv at Best buy when it was on sale for $99
