Upon INSTALLATION, I it found 5 viruses and plenty of residual trash files. It cleaned them up fast and allowed me to review what was cleaned or removed. Best part is, this app is lightweight, not all that extra nonsense you get with a lot of the others I've tried.

This is without doubt the best app to monitor YOUR OWN webcams. It can of course connect to any public streaming webcam but that is just a bi-product of having such a flexible app.In order to use it successfully so you can view from within your home or from anywhere outside your home when you are connected to data or wifi you need.....1 - a webcam (or webcams) connection to your own network (lan or wifi connected)2 - set up port forwarding on your home router3 - either pay your internet provider for a fixed IP address for your home network OR subscribe to a free DNS service  (like noip.com)Then load this app, or the free version, and put in your webcam parameters. Don't forget to put the app on your android phone also.It's not difficult - jfgi!

I installed this because my fire was running kinda funky. It is the 3rd app I have tried and this one is the best so far. I did have to pay $4.44 for the cleaning side of the app. My fire runs much better but I have run 2 scans so far and each time there is 8 virus files I click to see what they are, it will not show me but says clean garbage, I do so and it says it is clean. I give 3 stars because I am still unsure it is finding and getting rid of viruses.

Used tiny cam monitor free for maybe 1.5 months and was happy with it for monitoring my wifi camera- all Trendnet and one Foscam. The Free version worked fine for my needs except for the adds popping up. Like being able to have multiple cameras on one page. Decided to go to the Pro version to support the app- $4 is worth it and then there are no worries about accidentally hitting the app banner. Had all my cameras listed during set-up. It also allowed me to transfer the camera setup easily from the free version to the pro version. I have 2 pages of cameras and it is set up to stay on each page for 10 seconds before going to the 2nd page. You probably will want to remove all of the public cameras that come installed with the app.

Have cleaned my Kindle Fire Tablet numerous times per week since installing this software.  Results appear to be mixed, at times programs appear to run smoothly and other times there doesn't appear to be any changes.  When there are no noticeable changes some programs with won't run or they run slow.  Unknown if the problem is the Kindle Fire, software installed, internet or all of the above.

review_title: Great software to view your IP cameras
text_review: I started with the Free version then paid to get the Pro version, since it included sound (it was only two bucks then)It works great.  I have two Foscam wireless webcams and use this software on my Kindle Fire HD. I can easily view the cameras from inside my home network or any wireless connection outside my home.It opens quick, will show both cameras at once (or individually).  You can listen and talk through it (though talking is poor, likely due to wireless connection).It also enables a lot of the camera features like alarms and email/video recording.

review_title: Full featured app with excellent support - wyze cam v2 on firestick
text_review: Still trying to iron somethings out though so defaulting to sideloaded wyze app just to be honest. I’m getting trails on moving objects but when I email support for help they get back very quick. Trying some suggestions from them and will report back. I’d give it a try. I had to buy a bluetooth mouse to get the wyze app sideloaded and it’s not perfect either. It maybe integration with wyze so if you have other cameras default settings may work out of the box. Bluetooth mouse cost me $23. App is much cheaper.

I like this product because it is easy to use.  I am a senior and I appreciate a product that doesn't require a lot of tectie know how. I installed the product, read the information and "puff" it's working. Thank you for a great product that works, is easy to install and remembering us seniors.

Wish I could be given a list of the files and viruses being removed. I have a virus detector installed on my tablet but it did not catch the viruses this app said were on my device. And I guess I will need to run this every time I use my device because there is no automatic scan setting available.

I ran the cleaner and it showed 15 MB to be cleaned. Then my finger misfired and instead of heading here to offer a 5 Star rating, I ended up re-cleaning my Fire Tablet to access the button- link to come to the Appstore. Surprise surprise surprise it now showed 58 MB to be cleaned!! But I had just cleaned all the suggested 15 MB and now within seconds there is more! I repeated this process 8 more times, each time new amounts of MB were to be cleaned. Is this a never end and non-diminishing problem?

review_title: Keeps my Kindle 10 in. Tablet running smooth!
text_review: I have been running this app for 18 months. My tablet was not loading photos, so I ran the scan, removed the trash, and my tablet was runnI haing fine again! No other issues since installation. I like how simple and fast it is!  I have been playing for a long time. I usually buy the extra dash at 1.99 and overnight it has gone up to 13.99. Seems a little steep!

CCleaner doesn't appear to accomplish anything wirh my Fire 8, but does appear to work on my older 2nd Gen Fire 10.  Speed Booster's graphics state it's "freed up" space, but it's "result" is suspiciously repetitious.  This app seems more honest, in both posted result and Fire performance, than the others. Slightly faster and smoother performance.

I installed this because my fire was running kinda funky. It is the 3rd app I have tried and this one is the best so far. I did have to pay $4.44 for the cleaning side of the app. My fire runs much better but I have run 2 scans so far and each time there is 8 virus files I click to see what they are, it will not show me but says clean garbage, I do so and it says it is clean. I give 3 stars because I am still unsure it is finding and getting rid of viruses.

We use this as a baby monitor and it works great! I love that we can access from any phone or computer. On occasion we'll use it to monitor the house when my oldest daughter is babysitting. I love that we scan the house at different angles. It's like we're still there.

This is by far the best file & virus cleaner I have yet to find for my Amazon Kindle. The one thing that I didn't like is when you first download the app it tells you that it's free. Which couldn't be further from the truth because it will let you run the program & it'll tell you what's on your Kindle that needs to be removed. But when you go to download the virus remover it tells you that you must pay $3.99 which is fine because of how good the app work's. I just find it a bit misleading that it tells you it's free & then hits you w/ a $3.99 charge.

review_title: Keep an eye on your property from your phone, tablet and computer!
text_review: Best app Ever! I use this app all the time to watch my car and my patio door. It records images and sends them to my email. View live and it's only a spit sec. difference in time. Control your camera right from the app. We plan to add more cameras.

review_title: works great, easy to set up.
text_review: I bought this to use as a baby monitor on my kindle fire HD with my foscam 8910W cameras. The app has a camera scanner so it can get most of the details for set up on its own. Once I figured out the difficult part of port forwarding using a YouTube video or two, I'm now able to view my cameras from anywhere and I bought the app for my Android phone.Best features: control camera movement, movement and sound alarms, and viewing more than one camera at a time.

The two older TRENDNET cameras we have (TV-IP 512WN) works great on the home network and via Inernet.  We purchased two additional TRENDNET cameras (TV-IP 751WIC and TV-IP 851WIC) that are not currently supported.  We were able to use the TV-IP 551WI setting with encrypted password to view both cameras on the home network but can't view via Internet.  Would like to see support on these cameras on the next update.

review_title: The interface is clean and easy to navigate
text_review: I've tried several apps before finally deciding to use this app as my go-to app for my Foscam cameras. Camera set up is intuitive and straight forward. The interface is clean and easy to navigate. Easy to activate/deactivate the speaker/microphone on the camera as well as record video. Thanks tinyCam for a job well done. There were just way too many other apps, or few apps that do what you can in an easy user-friendly way.

review_title: If you are not a techie - stay away from these apps.
text_review: So confusing to use, I have 3 cameras on one NVR box, but it would only allow me to view one of the cameras from the box. Luckily I’ve got a monitor connected via HDMI to the NVR box so I’m not particularly fussed, but they really need to make these apps a bit simplistic.

It goes away for a while and seems to do what it is supposed to do.  Hard to tell. Tablet seems to run faster.  Very strange that none of the other virus checkers find anything but this one always does.  Also the fact that you have to rate it in order to get more features makes me wonder.  Will give it the benefit of the doubt for now and keep using it.

My family absolutely loves this camera.  We use it as a baby monitor and couldn't be happier.  The sound is very clear and picks up the faintest of sounds. My husband put it together so I'm not sure how easy that was but the general use is very easy.  The nightvision is very clear, you can even make out the pattern on her bed sheets ando pajamas. Highly recommend.

review_title: False Advertising, No Proof of changes
text_review: Product says it is a FREE OPTIMIZER & CLEANER - it is not. It does a free scan and THEN you have to pay (IN THE APP) to get the optimizer and cleaner. I was a fool and used my coins to continue... and I cannot return & refund. This is bait & switch. If people bought it through the site/store, they could get a refund when they see the app does nothing. But if you use coins, you are now stuck with a brick they claim fixed your kindle - but since it does not provide any information on what it did, you have no way of knowing.As a matter of fact, when I used my kindle to research how to get my coins back - it felt slower than ever. And please do not insult me with your generic blurb on how it removes hidden data and all that.

Has the potential to be good. Relatively easy to set up if you know the right info, but PAINFULLY SLOW. Other free apps out there that will do a better job. At first I though the CCTV feed had frozen, but coincidentally a car drove past the front of the house - it was either moving at crawling pace, or the app is unable to refresh fast enough.

review_title: I love the many options including local recording
text_review: Automatically picked up and configured my Insteon HD Cam in just a couple taps. I love the many options including local recording. I'd been trying several IP camera apps since the Insteon app is terrible with the camera (no landscape full screen view for instance). None of the other apps were as simple to use or had as many features. I love the background audio mode as I plan on using an old tablet as a baby monitor.

review_title: Scanner ONLY. You must but the cleaner.
text_review: This app is ONLY a scanner. You must purchase the actual cleaner. It runs a quick scan-but there's no way to tell how accurate it is w/o buying and running the associated cleaner. Very deceptive to call this a scanner AND cleaner. Even the description doesn't mention the reality of what this App is and isn't.

review_title: Nice App and Good Customer Support
text_review: I've been using this product for a couple years now and just bought it again for my newest phones.  The people that support this product have been really responsive in the past to my questions.  I also like to see when a company continues to improve on their software with regular updates.  You see upgrades to the app every month or two.  It gives you a good feeling that the company is planning to be around for the long haul.

This app starts out seeming great but after every scan, there are 8 viruses. (Just like everyone else said) andI just bought my fire hd 8, and I know there isn't any viruses let alone 8 and then you have to spend money to "fix& it. DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME

review_title: it works well for what I need
text_review: Just to watch my grandson when he is suppose to be taking a nap and I don't have the time or energy to run up and down the stairs to get him to lay down AGAIN and go to sleep, I can talk to him and convince him to do that for me.

It won't work with android wear watches. Which is why I purchased it. The description says it works with android wear watches. However, I get a pop-up that there is a bug with Amazon DRM protection. I don't like to give this a low reading, since it isn't the developers fault (if purchased from Google Play Store, it evidently works without a hitch). However, it still does not work as advertised.

Seems to help a bit, but it's hard to believe that I have three to five viruses each time that I cleaned my tablet. When I click the " see" title it won't show the files that are supposed to be infected. Also the promotional advertising for more of their own products are annoying.

This app started locking up my Kindle Fire so bad I had to do a hard reset, plug/unplug the power cable, then do another hard reset again just to get my Kindle to unlock and come back on. After contacting the developer multiple times, I realised he just didn't care. I have two other relatives who had the same problem, so I know it isn't just my Kindle. Actually, I have three Kindles, so that's a total of FIVE so far it won't work on. This app is a total loss, renders my Kindle unusable, and the developer is one of the worst I've dealt with on Amazon. He won't even respond to my requests for help anymore. I finally had to uninstall this app and bought "Ip cam viewer" (full) and found no problems so far with that one. Take my advice, if you have a Kindle Fire, stay away from this app. I do have to add this, the app does work well on my Nexus 7 tablet, but it does NOT WORK ON KINDLE FIRE DEVICES. If you have another kind of tablet, it is a hit or miss, try the free version first. Better yet, if you have IP cameras and want to be able to choose from a list of good monitoring apps that work, don't buy a Kindle in the first place. Buy something else that will allow purchases from the Google Playstore. There is a better selection and most likely your device will be compatible with this app. Good luck.

App appears to be working as advertised.  Finds both garbage and virus files and removes them.  However the quality of the user interface is so low that my confidence in the results is less than complete.  To be blunt, the user interface appears to be a joke.  It looks like something you would find on a game app for children.  It turns it turns me off something fierce.  It may just be me (probably is), but this shakes my confidence in the results and thus reduces the overall rating that I can give to the app.  Sorry, but I have to tell it like it is.

review_title: DO NOT BUY THIS PIECE OF JUNK!!!
text_review: I just paid for this app on my Fire TV Stick, and I'm extremely angry. When I run the app, it immediately freezes up and becomes unresponsive to inputs from the remote. Therefore, I cannot set up any cameras - in fact, I can't do ANYTHING except try to abort the app - which takes a long time to kill. So frustrating. What a piece of total garbage. I'm shocked that Amazon would even offer this app for sale. I will be attempting to get my money back. DO NOT BUY THIS!PS Aside from this tinyCam Monitor app annoyance, I'm really digging my new Fire TV Stick!

It seems like this is the best screen mirroring app available for Fire TV Stick. It works well screening my iPhone screen on Sony TV. You mirroring pictures on my phone. It can mirroring video file on my phone without sound. It does work when video within the app. Video within CNN or ESPN doesn’t play. This app is way below my expectations.

After using a popular cleaner, booster, virus scanning program for several years it occured to me that on three different tablets - and a zillion scans -not one virus had ever been detected. Upon noticing this application was designed for Kindle Fire tablets I thought I'd give it a go. On the first scan two viruses were found, cleaned, and eliminated. Today fourteen more were discovered! The process is lightning fast - no long wait. My Kindle Fire is working great.  Plus, I like the fact that this application is providing a higher level of protection for my tablet. There's a huge investment of money, time, and irreplaceable information on my tablet. It's foolish not to protect it.

The latest version regularly freezes my kindle fire and requires a reboot.  This also happens on my wife's fire and my Motorola attic (not as bad on the attic).  I have the latest foscam camera from amazon, so I assume this is should be a common setup...  This is very frustrating and unacceptable.  Do not buy the app until they release a fix.

review_title: The interface is clean and easy to navigate
text_review: I've tried several apps before finally deciding to use this app as my go-to app for my Foscam cameras. Camera set up is intuitive and straight forward. The interface is clean and easy to navigate. Easy to activate/deactivate the speaker/microphone on the camera as well as record video. Thanks tinyCam for a job well done. There were just way too many other apps, or few apps that do what you can in an easy user-friendly way.

review_title: Works so well I want to get more cameras!
text_review: Works great with my 3 Foscam Wifi P/T cameras!I tried the free version to verify that it could connect and operate my cameras, and it worked great, so I upgraded to the paid version (easy setup with the convenient export/import feature - very well thought out). The PRO features are totally worth the price.FastThis app works easily and the control/response from the camera is much faster than the app I was using on my iPhone. There is a lot of extra functionality like motion/audio detection and auto-recording and uploading. My kids like to turn the motion alarm on, and see if they can "Ninja" past the kitchen cam undetected (worth $3 right there just for the sustained silence/giggles from them!).Works on Fire StickI hadn't even thought of trying this on the Fire TV Stick until I read a few reviews here. I was really happy to see that it worked pretty well (the navigation is a little challenging, but you get used to it), and I was glad that one purchase gets me an app on 2 devices! Knowing that this works nicely on the Fire Stick opens up a bunch of possibilities for monitoring.Works great on Kindle Fire HDI can view all 3 cams at once, see/hear the motion alarm go off when there is movement, easily record, and do all the things you could imagine you would want to do in a security cam app.The Kindle Fire I have doesn't have a mic, but I read that headphones w/mic might work, and was very happy to find that my iPhone headphones work w/the Kindle, and I can talk/listen over the cameras with 'reasonable' clarity! I had pretty much given up on being able to talk over the cams, as all the apps I had tried in the past would send such garbled sound, (worse than Charlie Brown's teachers...kids look it up) and I couldn't get any mobile/desktop app to work with the Foscam 9821W talk functionality. This is the first app that lets me talk to that cam, and it works great!SecurityIt is great that SSL and encrypted password features are available, and work well, allowing you to access/control your cameras externally, but securely.The software is well designed and seems to be updated pretty frequently, as you can see from the support site: http://tinycammonitor.com/changelog.htmlNit-picks:- I wish the default view would have the movement controls- The 'preset' functions don't work for me

review_title: Better App than what I had......definitely!
text_review: I already had 2 Apps downloaded to check for viruses and to clean system......BUT I DOWNLOADED THIS JUST TO SEE WHAT IT WAS LIKE AND IT FOUND , ALL KINDS OF JUNK AND 7 viruses!  I think I will keep this App and get rid of the other ones!!!  Angelblue :)

review_title: Worked in one tablet, didnt work in the other one. Have to run apps on both devices. Almost useless
text_review: It's a shame that I wasn't warned about the loss of this fundamental feature in the new and supposedly improved fire TV 4k: The fact that I can't make the screen mirror natively as I did with my old Fire TV. Fortunately, I still keep the old stick in the kitchen and I can mirror the screens of ALL my android devices in it without issues...what a pity...!!!

review_title: it is easy to use however it has a glitch it easily looses connection and has to be restarted
text_review: My problem with this device is it will loose the connection while viewing video's I have to reconnect the mirror app to the computer and restart the app. I have had on several occasions had to reconnect my computer to the app on the T.V. and to watch the video which I had to pause.

review_title: Makes native AirPlay to FireTV doable!
text_review: It does the thing! With this installed on my fire stick, I can use AirPlay to play the videos in my Files app. I have actually been using the VLC app since it’s easier to find airplay on it but that app requires that you also select the cast option in order to stream the video and not just audio which is weird but I super don’t care because I’ve been trying so hard just to find something to get my videos from iPad to tv. Others have mentioned ads, and I can’t say whether they disrupt content yet; I’ve only seen them between actions (from playback to stopped, etc) and there’s an “x” button on all the ones I’ve seen immediately so they’re easy to bypass. So for me, good enough!

Basically allows you to airplay from your iPhone or Android like you would to an apple tv, you would think the firestick would have this feature built in for Apple devices but I guess apple can be hard to work with.  Very easy to use and very handy, only complaint is the ads which can get intrusive after a while

This App Is Really Good For Recording, But One Thing. On Certain Games Or Games On Roblox If Anything Pops Up or Just Random Question when You Enter The Game The Screen Recorder Stops. Again, This Is A Good Game But It Be Nice If It Could Be Fixed. 😁

As expected with anything that's worth using they're either plagued with ads, or you gotta pay for them.This app works seamlessly if you're coming from a Chromecast equipped device to the Fire TV, as the Amazon offering does not support it natively.This app does run in the background so you can interrupt what's on screen at any time by launching media from a Chromecast device, which is also convenient (like Rick rolling your friend from your phone).However you can't just buy this application outright. They offer only a subscription service, which depending on who you are, can be a good or bad thing. You can pay to try it longer and leave it, or buy a year pass for a decent price. However if everything uses this model, the monthly/yearly subscription costs could add up, so take it as it is. Because it's legitimately seamless, I will not remove any stars for this payment choice as I feel supporting good developers is a good thing.

I use this to mirrors my Mac to the Firestick using Airplay.  Easy to setup, and easy to use - but sometimes the software does not connect unless I restart it.  Also, some video streams can be a bit much for the bandwidth, resulting in dropped frames and jerky video - so not a perfect replacement for HDMI cable.  Still, very nice to be able to mirror from across the room.

We use this app mostly for gaming do our GM can share graphics and maps with us and with remote players at the same time. At first it worked fairly seamlessly, except for the ads, but without paying for the pro version I guess that is what you get.  After a month of using it, though, the app has decided it does not know how to play nicely with the computer from which it’s signal come, our WiFi, or our Amazon Fire TV box.  We have uninstalled and reinstalled to no avail.  If another option is available to you I would use that.

When I saw first saw this apps reviews, they all said that I should get it. But when I did get this app, was not happy. Whenever I go into the app it kept asking "Recme is not working, would you like to quit?" So yeah, I do not recommend this app for kindle fires.

review_title: Subscribed but still wants me to watch commercials.
text_review: Like how it was easy to set up, but 8/10 times, the app would lag. Also, I was subscribed because it was great to cast my phone to the TV, but afterwards, it seemed that the support for it became non-existent. The thing that made me give it a one star was the fact that I was subscribed to it, but it kept prompting me to buy the pro version (which I already have) and double dipping by having me watch commercials. This is without doubt the best app to monitor YOUR OWN webcams. It can of course connect to any public streaming webcam but that is just a bi-product of having such a flexible app.In order to use it successfully so you can view from within your home or from anywhere outside your home when you are connected to data or wifi you need.....1 - a webcam (or webcams) connection to your own network (lan or wifi connected)2 - set up port forwarding on your home router3 - either pay your internet provider for a fixed IP address for your home network OR subscribe to a free DNS service  (like noip.com)Then load this app, or the free version, and put in your webcam parameters. Don't forget to put the app on your android phone also.It's not difficult - jfgi!

review_title: Keep an eye on your property from your phone, tablet and computer!
text_review: Best app Ever! I use this app all the time to watch my car and my patio door. It records images and sends them to my email. View live and it's only a spit sec. difference in time. Control your camera right from the app. We plan to add more cameras.

review_title: works great, easy to set up.
text_review: I bought this to use as a baby monitor on my kindle fire HD with my foscam 8910W cameras. The app has a camera scanner so it can get most of the details for set up on its own. Once I figured out the difficult part of port forwarding using a YouTube video or two, I'm now able to view my cameras from anywhere and I bought the app for my Android phone.Best features: control camera movement, movement and sound alarms, and viewing more than one camera at a time.

The two older TRENDNET cameras we have (TV-IP 512WN) works great on the home network and via Inernet.  We purchased two additional TRENDNET cameras (TV-IP 751WIC and TV-IP 851WIC) that are not currently supported.  We were able to use the TV-IP 551WI setting with encrypted password to view both cameras on the home network but can't view via Internet.  Would like to see support on these cameras on the next update.

review_title: The interface is clean and easy to navigate
text_review: I've tried several apps before finally deciding to use this app as my go-to app for my Foscam cameras. Camera set up is intuitive and straight forward. The interface is clean and easy to navigate. Easy to activate/deactivate the speaker/microphone on the camera as well as record video. Thanks tinyCam for a job well done. There were just way too many other apps, or few apps that do what you can in an easy user-friendly way.

review_title: If you are not a techie - stay away from these apps.

It goes away for a while and seems to do what it is supposed to do.  Hard to tell. Tablet seems to run faster.  Very strange that none of the other virus checkers find anything but this one always does.  Also the fact that you have to rate it in order to get more features makes me wonder.  Will give it the benefit of the doubt for now and keep using it.

My family absolutely loves this camera.  We use it as a baby monitor and couldn't be happier.  The sound is very clear and picks up the faintest of sounds. My husband put it together so I'm not sure how easy that was but the general use is very easy.  The nightvision is very clear, you can even make out the pattern on her bed sheets ando pajamas. Highly recommend.

review_title: False Advertising, No Proof of changes
text_review: Product says it is a FREE OPTIMIZER & CLEANER - it is not. It does a free scan and THEN you have to pay (IN THE APP) to get the optimizer and cleaner. I was a fool and used my coins to continue... and I cannot return & refund. This is bait & switch. If people bought it through the site/store, they could get a refund when they see the app does nothing. But if you use coins, you are now stuck with a brick they claim fixed your kindle - but since it does not provide any information on what it did, you have no way of knowing.As a matter of fact, when I used my kindle to research how to get my coins back - it felt slower than ever. And please do not insult me with your generic blurb on how it removes hidden data and all that.

Has the potential to be good. Relatively easy to set up if you know the right info, but PAINFULLY SLOW. Other free apps out there that will do a better job. At first I though the CCTV feed had frozen, but coincidentally a car drove past the front of the house - it was either moving at crawling pace, or the app is unable to refresh fast enough.

You see upgrades to the app every month or two.  It gives you a good feeling that the company is planning to be around for the long haul.

After contacting the developer multiple times, I realised he just didn't care. I have two other relatives who had the same problem, so I know it isn't just my Kindle. Actually, I have three Kindles, so that's a total of FIVE so far it won't work on. This app is a total loss, renders my Kindle unusable, and the developer is one of the worst I've dealt with on Amazon. He won't even respond to my requests for help anymore. I finally had to uninstall this app and bought "Ip cam viewer" (full) and found no problems so far with that one. Take my advice, if you have a Kindle Fire, stay away from this app. I do have to add this, the app does work well on my Nexus 7 tablet, but it does NOT WORK ON KINDLE FIRE DEVICES. If you have another kind of tablet, it is a hit or miss, try the free version first. Better yet, if you have IP cameras and want to be able to choose from a list of good monitoring apps that work, don't buy a Kindle in the first place. Buy something else that will allow purchases from the Google Playstore. There is a better selection and most likely your device will be compatible with this app. Good luck.

review_title: Works so well I want to get more cameras!
text_review: Works great with my 3 Foscam Wifi P/T cameras!I tried the free version to verify that it could connect and operate my cameras, and it worked great, so I upgraded to the paid version (easy setup with the convenient export/import feature - very well thought out). The PRO features are totally worth the price.FastThis app works easily and the control/response from the camera is much faster than the app I was using on my iPhone. There is a lot of extra functionality like motion/audio detection and auto-recording and uploading. My kids like to turn the motion alarm on, and see if they can "Ninja" past the kitchen cam undetected (worth $3 right there just for the sustained silence/giggles from them!).Works on Fire StickI hadn't even thought of trying this on the Fire TV Stick until I read a few reviews here. I was really happy to see that it worked pretty well (the navigation is a little challenging, but you get used to it), and I was glad that one purchase gets me an app on 2 devices! Knowing that this works nicely on the Fire Stick opens up a bunch of possibilities for monitoring.Works great on Kindle Fire HDI can view all 3 cams at once, see/hear the motion alarm go off when there is movement, easily record, and do all the things you could imagine you would want to do in a security cam app.The Kindle Fire I have doesn't have a mic, but I read that headphones w/mic might work, and was very happy to find that my iPhone headphones work w/the Kindle, and I can talk/listen over the cameras with 'reasonable' clarity! I had pretty much given up on being able to talk over the cams, as all the apps I had tried in the past would send such garbled sound, (worse than Charlie Brown's teachers...kids look it up) and I couldn't get any mobile/desktop app to work with the Foscam 9821W talk functionality. This is the first app that lets me talk to that cam, and it works great!SecurityIt is great that SSL and encrypted password features are available, and work well, allowing you to access/control your cameras externally, but securely.The software is well designed and seems to be updated pretty frequently, as you can see from the support site: http://tinycammonitor.com/changelog.htmlNit-picks:- I wish the default view would have the movement controls- The 'preset' functions don't work for me

review_title: Better App than what I had......definitely!

If you create a pdf on the computer, it's just fine, but if you scan in a recipe, a piece of sheet music, a legal document, or whatever, you will NOT be able read it on your portable device. They "don't offer support for that at this time".

I read positive reviews about the app and since I wanted an additional way to print other than through my desktop, I found it neat to be able to do so with my Kindle Fire HD. The only reason I did not rate it 5 stars, is because sometimes the print button does not appear to print certain pages or items.

It has a major performance problem on Kindle Fire. Sync is very buggy on Google Drive between Android app and Kindle app version and when you edit a document, it will not sync on Google Drive. You have to pay twice for the app which is Android $19.99 and Kindle $14.99 to remove ads and get advance features. That price is way to high.

review_title: Great for word processing and reading pdf files
text_review: The Kindle Fire doesn't come with any word processing program, and this free version works great for me. I use it to download and read pdf's, and for writing basic documents. I know it has other features, like a spreadsheet program, but I haven't used those. I haven't found any reason to upgrade to the $10 version, it works great for my purposes.

review_title: App so/so. Google Pay not so much!
text_review: It opened Word docx, but not Libre Open Office odt files. DISLIKED that tho I tried to cancel subscription 3times the day before it renewed Google Pay charged for a full year the next day. PayPal went to bat for me getting a refund when I submitted the cancel msgs. Thank you PayPal.

This is the best mobile print application that you can have. It takes less than 2 minutes to set up and have your print in your hands. I have used this program from my laptop and from my tablet. Other print apps require up to several steps, complicated downloads, etc and then you might get a print, might not. This has never failed me. I love this app!

So I paid for the app years ago.  It just updated itself to this free edition.  Now I have to pay a monthly rental to print everything.  I already paid.  Microsoft is trying to bleed us all for what we paid for years ago.  Give me back my old version .

fun, easy to use... but for me, drawing with my finger is reeeally hard. like...3 adds an hour.cool drawing modes tho! I like it and u don't think I'm going to play on it ALL the time but if your bored it reeeeally great! my little sister uses her fav modes on it. OK if you get bored a lot great! not that bored? men...always busy? bbbbbleck!

review_title: The Office Suite 8 is easy to use and gives me the ability to view ...
text_review: I prefer using my computer most of the time, but some times it is necessary to use my phone or tablet.  The Office Suite 8 is easy to use and gives me the ability to view or create with ease from my Android devices.  I have not yet used all the functions available, but I am looking forward to trying all of them.

It's free to download the app, but if you want to actually use it, you need to upgrade to premium for $4.99. It's not free. I installed it, ran the setup wizard, gave it access to the printer and my files to find out I have to upgrade at a cost, to actually use it.  I am uninstalling frim my Kindle Fire as soon as I finish posting this review.

I have a tablet with no word processing program.  When I saw the availability of OfficeSuite 6, I jumped at the opportunity to write files, save them and go back and correct them.  It is easy to email the files to others.  I use the program extensively and am very happy with it. I would recommend OfficeSuite to anyone searching for a writing program.

Being able to edit or create documents and spreadsheets on Android was annoying at best but this app has solved that for me, for the most part anyway. Up to this point I've been able to easily deal with everything I've needed to do keeping in mind I haven't really put it to anything complex but being able to work on documents in the field without the need for a laptop has been a very welcome surprise

Great sketching app very fun just to draw for hours and very enjoyable you can upload your photos and draw on them and it just comes in handy when your bored and has nothing to do so I would recommend this app to ages one through one hundred one. Definitely worth the time of downloading and installing you won't be disappointed with the sketching app

review_title: that i can use it to open my word doc on my new kindle
text_review: I haven't had much of a chance to use it as my new kindle is not working correctly, and isn't accepting my word documents, I've been on the amazon kindle line and they are trying to escalate the issue as i can't send any docs to it yet. I did send them to my old kindle which should share with my new one but next i have to call them back

Neat and compact little drawing app. Excellent selection of pens and colours. Playback is a novel feature which lets you watch your finished art draw itself warts and all! I'm using it on a Fire tablet at present, first using a finger to draw but now I've purchased a vector pen (99p from eBay, sorry Amazon!) it can be a bit laggy but for quick and colourful sketches it works fine. For a free app you can't go wrong. Recommended.

This is a free app that gives your tablet, Kindle etc good basic word processing ability. I find it to be a good app to take notes when I am traveling. And creating simple documents. Once you have the free app you also have the option to get the premium package for a monthly fee. I haven't found that it necessary to get the premium package yet but am pleased that I have the option to upgrade. I would recommend this app.

review_title: Did not work - little to no trouble shooting to find out why.
text_review: Didn't work... Tried to install it a couple times. If it was my error.. And it may have been.. But I don't think so... then trouble shooting is horrible...BC all it says is something went wrong... No kidding.. That most people can figure out... It's the now what that matter- and installing more software doesn't do it.

After trying several apps that didn't work. I finally found one that works with my kindle fire and my canon printer. It is free also. I was able to print a .pdf and a picture so far and an email. I don't need to print often from my kindle fire but it is useful to be able to do it .

This is the app that Amazon had me use to update print settings due t o the new operating system. It does NOT work at all with my mx922 printer it won't print! I spent 2 hours with tech supportand they could not fix the problem. What a huge waste of time!!! My kindle sucks now and I can't even use it for my critical work duties. I am furious with amazon!!!!

I have a Samsung Galaxy 4 and was looking for an app to work with the phone and my new printer.  Could not believe how slick this was - connected immediately - I was using it only minutes after I installed Print Hammermill.  Could not ask for more - easy to use and fast - very happy!

I've tried quite a few drawing apps, and I have to say, this one is my favorite. I love how my sketches seem to almost happen by themselves! The feel of the sketch brush  really gave me confidence in my drawing. I've never been able to sketch something on my phone that wasn't overtly simplified and cutesy. This app changed that for me. I'm a fan.

This app has the same drawing style as Draw 'n' Sketchpad HD but the interface is much better. I rated this app down because:- I could not get the color picker to consistently choose a color.- Undo did not always work- Obtrusive ads. If there was a $ option to remove ads I would probably use it, but as it stands now I'm going to uninstall this app.

Buckle will not stay on.The points on the buckle are not sharp enough to dig into the belt to make a secure clamp, and the partition where the clamps slide to into is not deep enough.Liked the looks of the belt but does me no good if the buckle can’t stay connected.

I just recently downloaded this app for a chance to try out digital art and I have to say that after working with all the tools and mediums available for use in this app I am extremely happy to have the app. Each medium and style of drawing is easy to work with and gives a wide range of options for artists.

review_title: Finally an app i can use!!
text_review: I have an older model canon printer (with WiFi). The only canon app that works for it will print  jpegs only. I have tried just about every cloud printer app out there until I found this one! No more printer apps for me!Easy set up, easy to use. Works with any WiFi printer on the network. I can finally print PDFs and web pages without having to take a screen shot first! Can change printer settings for each and every print job...  Perfect app!

Wonderful, intuitive and versatile app.  Am so appreciative that Hammermill offers this - I will be even more loyal to your products, because of this.  I got a little hung up on setting up my EMail, but within a day, c/s gave me some tips and I'm all set (Samsung Galaxy S4 mini).

review_title: Will not print to some Canon models
text_review: I thought this was finally going to be a great printing app for my kindle fire. It installed easy and picked up my Canon Wifi right away. Unfortunately it wouldn't print. It kept saying "broken pipe".  I have a Canon MX452 and noticed the driver only says Canon mx45. There is no mx452 option:(

review_title: It's ok, not bad but not great
text_review: This Strine app is okay. Basically it's a blank piece of paper and some different colored pens you can use. You can't change the color of the paper as well. But it's not exactly what I thought it was going to be from the picture. But for a simple sketching doodling drawing app it works well for that.

OH.MY. first of all round of applause for bejoy mobile staff for in increating highly concentrated awesomeness first, it's FREE and nothing is greater than FREE two, so many options, unlike a regularsketch pad also like this if you like this rough draft: the light,the light all anya could think about, all there was, light light light. She was light. She glowed. Until,suddenly, the delightful feeling was gone,as was the eternal light. Gone? No no no! She tried to search but couldn't turn her head around. READ THE ANYA HEADED EAGLE TO FIND OUT MORE!!

This is an easy to use & setup app on my Fire HDX. I have an older model HP laserjet printer that I have connected to my computer with a "printer cable", not wi-fi. I wasn't sure if I could print on it with my wi-devices. I tought I would have to purchase a new printer. The app recognized my network and installed my old printer with no problems.

review_title: the best damn printing app out there
text_review: This application sets up easier and works better then the application being pushed by the printer manufacturerand if that wasn't enough I connected my HP 4050 N to the network and guess what the app spotted it right awayit and print it to it all in about 2 minutes so I don't know what more anybody can ask for it's just great

I use this suite on a Kindle Fire. It works but I think it could be a lot better. When using the spreadsheet app especially, it requires too many extra keystrokes. Some it's operations seem counter intuitive. I live with it because it's free but I really don't enjoy using it.

review_title: I am not very good with computer based apps but I have broken my ...
text_review: I am not very good with computer based apps but I have broken my ankle and can't sit at a desk so downloaded this onto my kindle wrote the letters that I wanted and emailed them to myself so they could be printed. I was rather pleased with myself. You might th June no a bit basic but for me brilliant

Can't print or email from the free version. The "pro" version was $15 which I almost bought until I figured out the fully functional version is actually the "premium" in-app purchase version which is $19.99 A YEAR. This is worse than useless. It is a scam. Went with a wholly different free app and it does it all.

It has a lot of different tools and textures to use and be creative with. I've been using it recently to create fan art and stuff, and it works really well! You can zoom in and out and move around the picture. The only problems I have is when I zoom in and out and move about the page, if I get too close to the edge of the picture it bugs out and automatically moves me away from where I wanted to be. Also, it records your actions/strokes, I would like for there to be an option to download the recorded strokes as a video or something. Overall it's a great app for sketching and such! x3

This app works great with my hp printer! It's even more fool proof than printing from my computer! The documents never have odd font or typesetting changes which has happened with other printing apps. It connects seamlessly and effortlessly to my hp printerI guess if one is willing to get the paid version of the app it might still work but now the only thing the app will print is a test page to discover if the app is compatible with the printer. I can't even find out the cost of the app without going through the motions of purchasing it because they are maintaining this fiction of it still being a free app.

review_title: Very simple to use sketching program
text_review: I was looking for a sketching program that I could use to practice on drawing facial proportions and Sketch Guru works very nicely. I haven't tried more than rough sketches at this point. It didn't take more than a minute to get started using this program. It's really easy to understand. There are some ads that pop up when you first open it, but that's all.

I have a Samsung Galaxy 4 and was looking for an app to work with the phone and my new printer.  Could not believe how slick this was - connected immediately - I was using it only minutes after I installed Print Hammermill.  Could not ask for more - easy to use and fast - very happy!

I was a little put off by so many negative comments about most of the other printer apps for the kindle fire, but this one seemed less problematic so I tried it. And I'm glad I did. It's easy to figure out, and so far has worked like a champ.

review_title: Worked in one tablet, didnt work in the other one. Have to run apps on both devices. Almost useless
text_review: It's a shame that I wasn't warned about the loss of this fundamental feature in the new and supposedly improved fire TV 4k: The fact that I can't make the screen mirror natively as I did with my old Fire TV. Fortunately, I still keep the old stick in the kitchen and I can mirror the screens of ALL my android devices in it without issues...what a pity...!!!

review_title: it is easy to use however it has a glitch it easily looses connection and has to be restarted
text_review: My problem with this device is it will loose the connection while viewing video's I have to reconnect the mirror app to the computer and restart the app. I have had on several occasions had to reconnect my computer to the app on the T.V. and to watch the video which I had to pause.

review_title: Makes native AirPlay to FireTV doable!
text_review: It does the thing! With this installed on my fire stick, I can use AirPlay to play the videos in my Files app. I have actually been using the VLC app since it’s easier to find airplay on it but that app requires that you also select the cast option in order to stream the video and not just audio which is weird but I super don’t care because I’ve been trying so hard just to find something to get my videos from iPad to tv. Others have mentioned ads, and I can’t say whether they disrupt content yet; I’ve only seen them between actions (from playback to stopped, etc) and there’s an “x” button on all the ones I’ve seen immediately so they’re easy to bypass. So for me, good enough!

Basically allows you to airplay from your iPhone or Android like you would to an apple tv, you would think the firestick would have this feature built in for Apple devices but I guess apple can be hard to work with.  Very easy to use and very handy, only complaint is the ads which can get intrusive after a while

This App Is Really Good For Recording, But One Thing. On Certain Games Or Games On Roblox If Anything Pops Up or Just Random Question when You Enter The Game The Screen Recorder Stops. Again, This Is A Good Game But It Be Nice If It Could Be Fixed. 😁

As expected with anything that's worth using they're either plagued with ads, or you gotta pay for them.This app works seamlessly if you're coming from a Chromecast equipped device to the Fire TV, as the Amazon offering does not support it natively.This app does run in the background so you can interrupt what's on screen at any time by launching media from a Chromecast device, which is also convenient (like Rick rolling your friend from your phone).However you can't just buy this application outright. They offer only a subscription service, which depending on who you are, can be a good or bad thing. You can pay to try it longer and leave it, or buy a year pass for a decent price. However if everything uses this model, the monthly/yearly subscription costs could add up, so take it as it is. Because it's legitimately seamless, I will not remove any stars for this payment choice as I feel supporting good developers is a good thing.

I use this to mirrors my Mac to the Firestick using Airplay.  Easy to setup, and easy to use - but sometimes the software does not connect unless I restart it.  Also, some video streams can be a bit much for the bandwidth, resulting in dropped frames and jerky video - so not a perfect replacement for HDMI cable.  Still, very nice to be able to mirror from across the room.

We use this app mostly for gaming do our GM can share graphics and maps with us and with remote players at the same time. At first it worked fairly seamlessly, except for the ads, but without paying for the pro version I guess that is what you get.  After a month of using it, though, the app has decided it does not know how to play nicely with the computer from which it’s signal come, our WiFi, or our Amazon Fire TV box.  We have uninstalled and reinstalled to no avail.  If another option is available to you I would use that.

When I saw first saw this apps reviews, they all said that I should get it. But when I did get this app, was not happy. Whenever I go into the app it kept asking "Recme is not working, would you like to quit?" So yeah, I do not recommend this app for kindle fires.

review_title: Subscribed but still wants me to watch commercials.
text_review: Like how it was easy to set up, but 8/10 times, the app would lag. Also, I was subscribed because it was great to cast my phone to the TV, but afterwards, it seemed that the support for it became non-existent. The thing that made me give it a one star was the fact that I was subscribed to it, but it kept prompting me to buy the pro version (which I already have) and double dipping by having me watch commercials. I would check my membership and verify the monthly subscription was checked and also checked my profile that I have paid the due. I also checked my credit card statement and it was paid. So why? I don't know. Now, I can't connect to it at all so it's absolutely trash at this point. Very disappointed.

I have tried to record myself, but it never works, after a short amount of time it will glitch and stop recording, and the footage I did catch corrupts, then its 1 hour of work down the drain. Even when I have somehow got it to continue to record, the footage still becomes corrupt, if you want my opinion, I would suggest "omelet arcade", it lets you play on peoples Minecraft severs, lets you live stream any game, and it lets you record normally too!

I had looked into a few different apps to stream, but this one had the best reviews and for me, it has worked well.

Want to cast my Ipad (Apple TV app) to my Amazon Fire Cube, which the description says can be done.  Uh, huh.  NOT recommended.  One GREAT point to remember is that AirScreen has a free version.  Of course, that said, you definitely get what you pay for.

review_title: I really like that i can cast my screen to my tv without using any cables

I have not tried my pc yet but for mac you cast and away you go. I did find one thing though if you have a dvd player on your mac which mine is an older mac you cannot cast the dvd to the tv for some reason not sure why but it does not work.

Useful app when you need to mirror something from your iOS device to a device that doesn't have integrated mirroring capability.
