review_title: That sucks. I understand that NBC gets money when we ...
text_review: As others have noted, this only works if you have TV service going with another provider. That sucks. I understand that NBC gets money when we subscribe on cable. They should provide a fee-based service (CBS does...) to get all of their content online. I am wondering if this changes in the near future as HULU is supposed to be adding another level of service where they will have live broadcasts of the major networks.

review_title: Consistent buffering even with 100 MBPS speeds.
text_review: I use this app primarily for streaming F1 and NHL games but recently it's been barely usable. The buffering I experience is only with this application. I even purchased a new Fire TV upgrading from a gen 1 Fire Stick thinking it could be the issue but nope. Zero issues when streaming Netflix, HBOGO, Showtime but NBCSN... buffers all the time. Live, replays, you name it, buffering. Other devices I use in the same location are getting 100+ MBPS speeds so buffering shouldn't be an issue if it wasn't for the application itself. Streaming from the NBCSN website on my laptop doesn't seem to hiccup so once again must be app related. Can't wait for F1 to have their own streaming service so I ditch this garbage application and gladly pay someone to have a good quality app/stream.

Hope to watch some of the Olympics and NBC was the only avenue to do that. Got the app, but NBC also required not just my Internet connection on fire stick, but also that I have a regular monthly subscription to an old-fashioned cable network. Too bad. I cut cable long ago.

review_title: Fire version of the app doesn't list Brighthouse as a supporting provider even though they are.
text_review: At least they are for a provider I can select in the Windows 8 and Android versions of the app. When I enter "provider not listed"  it asks for my zip code and lets me select Brighthouse, but then simply tells me to go back to the main screen and select Brighthouse (which still isn't an option).

wanted to watch game on BTN and had Fox sports on sling tv so I installed it. When I tryed to watch it it said I didnt have the authority to do so.  Waited a day and and tried to watch replay and same thing. What a huge waste of time. You get a special app that allows you to see what you cant watch.

review_title: Can not fast forward or rewind on FireTV or Roku
text_review: First of all pros:1. Better Live streaming quality than Hulu. Last year I tried both for watching World Cup and Fubo was the clear winner.2. Lots of soccer Live streamingThe thing I don't like:1. Fast forward and rewind are not available on FireTV or Roku. It can be done on cell phone or lap top so it is not a technical issue.This is super painful because some of the video on demand sports contents have more than one hour extra recording before the real game start. I have to wait patiently for > one hour to watch a game. On the bright side, they just added "Resume" function recently. Before that if someone accidentally exit the game I would have to wait again. This is very inconsiderate and makes me want to drop.2. No ABC - This is not a blocker because I can switch to antenna to watch NBA, Oscar, etc.3. Recent some of the soccer games such as Woman World Cup by Telemundo are streamed at 960x540 with wrong aspect ratio. Video is letterboxed and players are squeezed short vertically.*Update on 7/8/2019 This issue has been resolved.4. Ads. Sometimes Ads does not work properly. For example, I was watching the TV show Heros, Ads started, indicating it is going to play 4 ads. the first ad played twice. then after the 3rd ad (Xfinity ad with two turtles), it went back to Ad 1. This cycle repeated again and again without moving on. In the end I had to give up on that show.

I can't believe CBS wants to charge $5.99/month for this even with an existing cable account. Compared to NBC and Fox's apps (which are free services for Comcast subscribers) the stream quality for live TV is garbage. Signed up for my free trial to watch NFL playoffs and will be canceling before CBS has a chance to charge me for an app that is inferior to its competitors' free offerings.

Terrible timing of many commercial breaks.Opening ceremony was a joke.  Too jumpy with almost all closeups and no feel for what the overall event looked like. I WON'T WATCH THE CLOSING.Finally - please put Bob Costas out to pasrure.  He stopped being relevant about 20 years ago. The plastic surgery may have kep\ him looking younger but he talks like an old man who just enjoys hearing his own voice. I'm 70 and he SOUNDS OLD to me. With all the talented and knowledgeable sports men and women out there, NBC can do much better.

Where do I start with a review of the NBC Sports app? It works, so that's a plus. There are many other apps out there for sports, but not any others which play NBC Sports, such as the Olympics. Other apps allow one to organize the offerings based on the league and date. There is no such organization with this one. Instead, you get a scrolling list of live events, a list of replayed events, and highlights. And NBC, which advertised that you can watch the Olympics anywhere and anytime, didn't bring this functionality to the Fire TV Stick. Not impressed.

This is without a doubt the best mobile sports app. Have it on my GS4 and Kindle Fire.and no matter what other sports apps I try I keep returning to the CBS app. It's free so you have nothing to lose by giving it a try. You won't be sorry.

This app used to work perfectly. NOT ANYMORE!!!  The person or persons responsible for this RIDICULOUS development should be fired. Not just for it happening but for it not being fixed immediately. This seems to happen a lot with Amazon updates that does not happen with Google or Apple products. Very disappointed with Amazon.

review_title: Needs cable provider update to support Fire Stick TV
text_review: Love this app. It works well on my iPad iPhone Kindle and PC. However my only complaint is that the app does not work on my Fire TV Stick. Not because the app is not available but because my cable provider is not available on the Fire Stick TV. This makes absolutely no sense since cox communications is all over the country and it works on my Kindle which is an Amazon device also. Please add Cox Communcations to the list of providers!

review_title: Well let’s start with Super Bowl Sunday
text_review: Well let’s start with Super Bowl Sunday.  I recently signed up for xfinity and they lost channel five!!  We were sitting here with people coming for the game and a lot of food and know game. I realized that I had amazon prime and the fire stick!  Found NBC and loaded it. I got to watch the game and other than the refreshing it was great!  Thank you amazon and NBC you made a bad moment into a great day!  You just inherited a fan!

review_title: Appalled at the fees involved in watching "our" USA olympic team.
text_review: Without paying the outdated and incredibly high cable fees, this was not really a good option for seeing the Olympics.  Appalled at the fees involved in watching "our" USA olympic team.  Or the number of commercials!!  This was so difficult that our family of 5 just stopped trying to see the Olympics.  In fact, it's likely there will be a whole generation of kids that miss out and therefore don't care about the Olympics, simply due to the greed involved in broadcasting them.Why do you need 20 different media channels for every event. Make it cheaper for your self, and make it available to the American public..... instead of trying to maximize every last penny you can out of every last show you put on.  Is there no corporate good for the public interest anymore. NBC and the Olympics have lost their way here.

review_title: when my friends got to my house ready to watch the super bowl, we scrambled to find a way to ...
text_review: Didn't realize my new cable provider took away my basic channels when they took over. I haven't had cable for a couple years but could always get abc, nbc, fox and abc by just having the cable wire plugged in. So...when my friends got to my house ready to watch the super bowl, we scrambled to find a way to watch it, nbs sports app on the fire stick seemed to be a winner. Experienced a lot of buffering, assuming it was because it was the big game. Other than that, picture quality and sound were both decent when it was on. I'll try it out on something not as popular but the buffering made it rather annoying.

review_title: Olympics on Fire TV Stick. Yes with this specific App. Here is how.
text_review: This works for Olympics on Fire TV Stick without a cable provider but watch the glitch. Each time the app reopens it toggles in the top left between the logo for this app, and the logo for the standard app which needs a cable account. Pay attention, ignore the other logo. I will add a pic if it goes through with this review.When you are in this app on this device there will be a row with hundreds of live or upcoming events. When the network is showing Olympics on NBC broadcast TV, a box for this will be in the mix of events. That mirrors the NBC broadcast, and will end as the network does. Look at the pic I will try to attach.The majority of the events are raw with no announcers or scoring, but is excellent quality, and some of the practices are shown as well.A similar App on Roku misbehaved badly for me.

Seriously, people who want an app like this mostly want it because we cut ties with the big money hungry cable services. But you cannot USE this app unless you DO subscribe to one of them. This is ridiculous at best, and a waste of time. If you have a Firestick only, don't bother with this download. Complete POS.

I dislike that I cannot activate this app. I contacted Amazon before I purchased Amazon Fire Tv stick to make sure I could use the NBCSN app so I could watch the NASCAR races. I was told by Amazon that yes it was included with Fire Tv. I cannot activate this app without an account number from my cable provider which is Dish Network. However, my cable is included in my rent. I called our resident services, they have no access to the cable account as it is a corporate account. They suggested I call dish network. Dish Network told me to call corporate. So again I contacted Amazon only to be told to contact NBC. I tried, to no avail. How do I activate NBCSN? I am an Amazon Prime member and the only reason I purchased the Amazon Fire Tv stick was for NBCSN.

review_title: Was trying to use it to watch Sunday Night Football ...
text_review: Was trying to use it to watch Sunday Night Football, but it seemed to pause every few seconds. My phone would alert me a few minutes before I saw on the app that a touchdown occurred. It also wasn't an internet issue, as the router is right next to the firestick and TV.

review_title: EXTREMELY LOUSY CHANNEL, A RIP OFF!!
text_review: They really deserve a 1/4 star. The channel is a fraud. I paid the first month and am canceling soon. I could not watch ONE GAME without freezes and disconnecting. You have to reboot about every 5 to 10 minutes to get an image with movement. and of course, when you reboot a team made a goal and you missed it. I sent them  on the very first day a complaint and somebody answered that due to the high demand of the games there were problems. HELLO!!! All the soccer games will be in high demand. My neighbor has Sling, costs more but it delivers everything flawlessly. Just in case I asked him to come over and hook up with sling and his password to see if I had problems with the my TV and NO, NO PROBLEM. The only problem that I have is how I got ripped off by these Futbotv thugs. I have complained 5 more times to NO REPLY from customer NO SERVICE. As you can notice I am VERY PISSED OFF!!!  i ASKED FOR A REFUND AND NO REPLY!!!! Don't be suckers like me, stay away from these amateur channel people. Not worth their weight in chicken feces!!!

I do not recommend it, I gave it 1 star because I can't give 0, very frustrating to sign in, is a hustle. I am in the 7 day trial I will not continue. It  took me more than 3 times to sign in, trying to watch the clasico. I went back to bein on sling tv, which is not that good neither, but I think I preferred it over Fubo. II took me some time to sign up, I kept receiving a message saying that my email was invalid, finally I was able to sign up, then I went through a lot to of problems to sign in, then after I signed in it went off, I had to do it all over again,  I was in and off again, I went back to Sling TV again it is not a 100% better than Fubo but a lot better I got Bein on Sling TV and I was able to watch El Clasico with no problem. I read negative reviews on Fubo TV I should had paid attention. Do not waste your time and money on Fubo.Up date, the trial period passed with out I being able to watched anything on Fubo TV. But before  I finally was able to sign in, after I received an email offering me $10.00 credit for my trouble forwards the 1st, month membership fee . Well, I didn't see any credit on my account and just after that a genius at Fubo TV changed my password sent me an email indicating to follow the info in the email to sign in, The only info in the email was my email, no password or link to reset my password, tried to reset my password myself, I received a message indicating that an email will be sent with a link to reset my password, never received it and I tried several times, no response from Fubo either, Terrible Customer and Technical service the worst most frustrating site and service I had come across in my life. DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME AND MOST IMPORTANTLY YOUR MONEY!!!!!!

review_title: You’re not providing a better product than Cable
text_review: Don’t say “Watch Free” and then charge $60 for a “Free”It’s false advertising!You are just as bad as Cable.The whole point of “streaming” is to watch WITHOUT paying the insane fees Cable companies charge, and get a better quality picture.If a consumer is paying $65+ for hi speed internet in order to stream and you’re charging $60 on top of that, why wouldn’t I just go with a Cable company?I think that your corporate bigwigs are completely missing the point of providing better product for the consumer.

Current PlayStation Vue customer looking for replacement streaming service.  Decided to try Fubo because they offer BET channel.  After signing up for trial, I saw my local ABC station is unavailable.  I cancelled trial after two days.  Not sure why it isn’t offered; tried to search rather internet for a reason to avail.  If you watch local TV, tread carefully.

review_title: It was not worth the money
text_review: The majority of the sports we wanted to watch were blocked out and we couldn't see them, when we complained and wanted our money back they said no and after a few more calls they finally canceled us.  I don't believe we got to watch one home team play.  It was a waste of money

Hi. Not seeing medals ceremonies has been unsatisfying... and re runs 2 times a day with waay too many commercials take away from all of the the splendid athletes who get no air time.. ...Commentators talk way too much during events, and supportive comments after performances are uplifting for All of Humanity... Its almost like a lot is not being shown purposely; so a complete Olympic video can be made and sold...😉

The overall “format” of this product if very good and easily navigatable. The poor aspect of this app, is not having the ability to fast forward or rewind at a faster rate. If you’re on a computer/tablet you’re fine because you simply swipe. On the fire stick, you can only fast forward/rewind ten seconds at a time. Making fast forwarding a game where the app crashed or reset, a stenosis process.

review_title: Could not watch game due to provider schedule
text_review: I downloaded to watch baseball game as Hulu does not show entire game is extends past a certain time.  But I had to use Hulu account and thus Hulu channel schedule was showing poker and thus the game was no longer available.  So I can only give 3 stars even though the app is pretty good.

I is too hard to find scores.  If you are looking for a BB team who is not in the top 25, it is very hard to work your way thru the website.  I still can not find scores of games involving teams that are not in the Top 25.

review_title: Not happy. It would be nice to have clear app requirements & apps that actually work!
text_review: It never worked. Signing up for some of these apps is very misleading. Prior to downloading,  the app does not tell you before you download it that you must have cable or satellite or a membership to Hulu or any of the other server type apps in order for the apps to work.  So it's a waste of time to download then set up the account and then find out at the end of setting up the account that you need one of these other services in order for the app to work. Apps need to be more upfront with what's required before you do all the downloads.

The product has potential. It has the channels except for Turner channels. But, it you watch a highly watched sports event Fubo doesn’t have the bandwidth to deliver. You will get several “we’re having technical difficulties” messages interrupting the game. If you call customer service it’s an hour on hold to get a person who knows less than the customer. If you email they get back to you in a week. I had to delete and reinstall the app daily for six weeks before giving up. I was running Fubo on a 2020 Nvidia Shield Pro, the fastest streaming device available.

When trying to activate the app, you are required to sign in with your carrier.  They are not talking about the carrier of your internet, rather which company allows usage of apps on your devices.  The Sports Gold is the app for streaming devices i.e. Roku, Fire TV, Apple TV, etc.

I saw online that CBS HQ was broadcasting the super bowl, so I activated the app on my firestick 4k.  Picture was amazing !!!  So I switched back and forth to the game on my local CBS broadcast.  There was a large difference in picture quality between the 2 broadcasts.  Very happy.

review_title: Amazing Olympic Games coverage on Amazon Fire TV
text_review: The Olympic Games represent the highest accomplishments of the athletes who have made it to these games in Brazil. As a native South American, I am tremendously proud of these games being held in the continent of my birth and, as far as I have witnessed, the great success that is being accomplished by the host country. I'm very appreciative of the coverage which is available on NBC Sports through my Amazon Five TV service and I am able to follow all of my favorite sports through this brilliant service. This is by far the best streaming service I have in my home at the moment.

review_title: one of the worst apps ever made
text_review: Absolutely dreadful app. Barely works, activation doesn't work, have to constantly sign in, one of the worst apps ever made. The one good thing about the Champions League license going to TNT is while there will be less games, at least FOX will not be allowed to tarnish the experience anymore.

review_title: If you can avoid using this app do it.  It will cause you more stress then convenience
text_review: Every single time I watch an EPL game the app does something stupid.  Most of the time it makes me reset on the middle of a match and then I have to watch another commercial.  Really make question the integrity of NBC.  I have to delete this app.  It's definitely the worst streaming app I've ever used.

review_title: There is not a SINGLE time where I've tried to watch a game that does not cut off completely and/or looks like its at SUPER LOW QUALITY
text_review: Fubo TV is a disaster!!!!I've had Fubo TV app on my Roku for about a year. There is not a SINGLE time where I've tried to watch a game that does not cut off completely and/or looks like its at SUPER LOW QUALITY.They are basically stealing your money away. The only reason why i've had it for so long its because I could not afford to have cable tv. But id rather save my money than watch crappy streamings. Every time I play a game i can watch about 25% of it because its quality is a disaster or it simply does not load up. beware, they will take your money and not provide a clear signal. UNACCEPTABLE!

Watched most of the super bowl only to have the app I loaded on my tv fail to stream the game. The app would close as soon as I opened it up; I shut the tv off, reloaded the app and it continued to open and then shut down immediately.

I tried Fubo for a week free to see if I could watch NFL games that are not broadcast in my area.  Their promos indicated that I could, or at least that's the way I read it, but fact is I can't get any more games on Fubo than I can with my current channels.  So I will not keep when week is up.

review_title: A Cable TV subscription is required for this app to work.
text_review: If I had a cable TV subscription I would have no use for Fox Sports GO.I don't have a cable TV subscription so it is totally useless to me.  Even if I did it would be Comcast (Xfinity) or Verizon (FIOS).  Neither of them are supported in my zip code by the app.

review_title: There ok but not worth $65 to not have everything I like and false advertisement.
text_review: They were pretty good except they have a lot what I like not available. Plus I signed up for 7 days free trial, then I get a message the next day that my trial is ending in just 3 days. So I deleted the rest of my trial for the false advertisement.

Upon INSTALLATION, I it found 5 viruses and plenty of residual trash files. It cleaned them up fast and allowed me to review what was cleaned or removed. Best part is, this app is lightweight, not all that extra nonsense you get with a lot of the others I've tried.

This is without doubt the best app to monitor YOUR OWN webcams. It can of course connect to any public streaming webcam but that is just a bi-product of having such a flexible app.In order to use it successfully so you can view from within your home or from anywhere outside your home when you are connected to data or wifi you need.....1 - a webcam (or webcams) connection to your own network (lan or wifi connected)2 - set up port forwarding on your home router3 - either pay your internet provider for a fixed IP address for your home network OR subscribe to a free DNS service  (like noip.com)Then load this app, or the free version, and put in your webcam parameters. Don't forget to put the app on your android phone also.It's not difficult - jfgi!

I installed this because my fire was running kinda funky. It is the 3rd app I have tried and this one is the best so far. I did have to pay $4.44 for the cleaning side of the app. My fire runs much better but I have run 2 scans so far and each time there is 8 virus files I click to see what they are, it will not show me but says clean garbage, I do so and it says it is clean. I give 3 stars because I am still unsure it is finding and getting rid of viruses.

Used tiny cam monitor free for maybe 1.5 months and was happy with it for monitoring my wifi camera- all Trendnet and one Foscam. The Free version worked fine for my needs except for the adds popping up. Like being able to have multiple cameras on one page. Decided to go to the Pro version to support the app- $4 is worth it and then there are no worries about accidentally hitting the app banner. Had all my cameras listed during set-up. It also allowed me to transfer the camera setup easily from the free version to the pro version. I have 2 pages of cameras and it is set up to stay on each page for 10 seconds before going to the 2nd page. You probably will want to remove all of the public cameras that come installed with the app.

Have cleaned my Kindle Fire Tablet numerous times per week since installing this software.  Results appear to be mixed, at times programs appear to run smoothly and other times there doesn't appear to be any changes.  When there are no noticeable changes some programs with won't run or they run slow.  Unknown if the problem is the Kindle Fire, software installed, internet or all of the above.

review_title: Great software to view your IP cameras
text_review: I started with the Free version then paid to get the Pro version, since it included sound (it was only two bucks then)It works great.  I have two Foscam wireless webcams and use this software on my Kindle Fire HD. I can easily view the cameras from inside my home network or any wireless connection outside my home.It opens quick, will show both cameras at once (or individually).  You can listen and talk through it (though talking is poor, likely due to wireless connection).It also enables a lot of the camera features like alarms and email/video recording.

review_title: Full featured app with excellent support - wyze cam v2 on firestick
text_review: Still trying to iron somethings out though so defaulting to sideloaded wyze app just to be honest. I’m getting trails on moving objects but when I email support for help they get back very quick. Trying some suggestions from them and will report back. I’d give it a try. I had to buy a bluetooth mouse to get the wyze app sideloaded and it’s not perfect either. It maybe integration with wyze so if you have other cameras default settings may work out of the box. Bluetooth mouse cost me $23. App is much cheaper.

I like this product because it is easy to use.  I am a senior and I appreciate a product that doesn't require a lot of tectie know how. I installed the product, read the information and "puff" it's working. Thank you for a great product that works, is easy to install and remembering us seniors.

Wish I could be given a list of the files and viruses being removed. I have a virus detector installed on my tablet but it did not catch the viruses this app said were on my device. And I guess I will need to run this every time I use my device because there is no automatic scan setting available.

I ran the cleaner and it showed 15 MB to be cleaned. Then my finger misfired and instead of heading here to offer a 5 Star rating, I ended up re-cleaning my Fire Tablet to access the button- link to come to the Appstore. Surprise surprise surprise it now showed 58 MB to be cleaned!! But I had just cleaned all the suggested 15 MB and now within seconds there is more! I repeated this process 8 more times, each time new amounts of MB were to be cleaned. Is this a never end and non-diminishing problem?

review_title: Keeps my Kindle 10 in. Tablet running smooth!
text_review: I have been running this app for 18 months. My tablet was not loading photos, so I ran the scan, removed the trash, and my tablet was runnI haing fine again! No other issues since installation. I like how simple and fast it is!  I have been playing for a long time. I usually buy the extra dash at 1.99 and overnight it has gone up to 13.99. Seems a little steep!

CCleaner doesn't appear to accomplish anything wirh my Fire 8, but does appear to work on my older 2nd Gen Fire 10.  Speed Booster's graphics state it's "freed up" space, but it's "result" is suspiciously repetitious.  This app seems more honest, in both posted result and Fire performance, than the others. Slightly faster and smoother performance.

I installed this because my fire was running kinda funky. It is the 3rd app I have tried and this one is the best so far. I did have to pay $4.44 for the cleaning side of the app. My fire runs much better but I have run 2 scans so far and each time there is 8 virus files I click to see what they are, it will not show me but says clean garbage, I do so and it says it is clean. I give 3 stars because I am still unsure it is finding and getting rid of viruses.

We use this as a baby monitor and it works great! I love that we can access from any phone or computer. On occasion we'll use it to monitor the house when my oldest daughter is babysitting. I love that we scan the house at different angles. It's like we're still there.

This is by far the best file & virus cleaner I have yet to find for my Amazon Kindle. The one thing that I didn't like is when you first download the app it tells you that it's free. Which couldn't be further from the truth because it will let you run the program & it'll tell you what's on your Kindle that needs to be removed. But when you go to download the virus remover it tells you that you must pay $3.99 which is fine because of how good the app work's. I just find it a bit misleading that it tells you it's free & then hits you w/ a $3.99 charge.

review_title: Keep an eye on your property from your phone, tablet and computer!
text_review: Best app Ever! I use this app all the time to watch my car and my patio door. It records images and sends them to my email. View live and it's only a spit sec. difference in time. Control your camera right from the app. We plan to add more cameras.

review_title: works great, easy to set up.
text_review: I bought this to use as a baby monitor on my kindle fire HD with my foscam 8910W cameras. The app has a camera scanner so it can get most of the details for set up on its own. Once I figured out the difficult part of port forwarding using a YouTube video or two, I'm now able to view my cameras from anywhere and I bought the app for my Android phone.Best features: control camera movement, movement and sound alarms, and viewing more than one camera at a time.

The two older TRENDNET cameras we have (TV-IP 512WN) works great on the home network and via Inernet.  We purchased two additional TRENDNET cameras (TV-IP 751WIC and TV-IP 851WIC) that are not currently supported.  We were able to use the TV-IP 551WI setting with encrypted password to view both cameras on the home network but can't view via Internet.  Would like to see support on these cameras on the next update.

review_title: The interface is clean and easy to navigate
text_review: I've tried several apps before finally deciding to use this app as my go-to app for my Foscam cameras. Camera set up is intuitive and straight forward. The interface is clean and easy to navigate. Easy to activate/deactivate the speaker/microphone on the camera as well as record video. Thanks tinyCam for a job well done. There were just way too many other apps, or few apps that do what you can in an easy user-friendly way.

review_title: If you are not a techie - stay away from these apps.
text_review: So confusing to use, I have 3 cameras on one NVR box, but it would only allow me to view one of the cameras from the box. Luckily I’ve got a monitor connected via HDMI to the NVR box so I’m not particularly fussed, but they really need to make these apps a bit simplistic.

It goes away for a while and seems to do what it is supposed to do.  Hard to tell. Tablet seems to run faster.  Very strange that none of the other virus checkers find anything but this one always does.  Also the fact that you have to rate it in order to get more features makes me wonder.  Will give it the benefit of the doubt for now and keep using it.

My family absolutely loves this camera.  We use it as a baby monitor and couldn't be happier.  The sound is very clear and picks up the faintest of sounds. My husband put it together so I'm not sure how easy that was but the general use is very easy.  The nightvision is very clear, you can even make out the pattern on her bed sheets ando pajamas. Highly recommend.

review_title: False Advertising, No Proof of changes
text_review: Product says it is a FREE OPTIMIZER & CLEANER - it is not. It does a free scan and THEN you have to pay (IN THE APP) to get the optimizer and cleaner. I was a fool and used my coins to continue... and I cannot return & refund. This is bait & switch. If people bought it through the site/store, they could get a refund when they see the app does nothing. But if you use coins, you are now stuck with a brick they claim fixed your kindle - but since it does not provide any information on what it did, you have no way of knowing.As a matter of fact, when I used my kindle to research how to get my coins back - it felt slower than ever. And please do not insult me with your generic blurb on how it removes hidden data and all that.

Has the potential to be good. Relatively easy to set up if you know the right info, but PAINFULLY SLOW. Other free apps out there that will do a better job. At first I though the CCTV feed had frozen, but coincidentally a car drove past the front of the house - it was either moving at crawling pace, or the app is unable to refresh fast enough.

review_title: I love the many options including local recording
text_review: Automatically picked up and configured my Insteon HD Cam in just a couple taps. I love the many options including local recording. I'd been trying several IP camera apps since the Insteon app is terrible with the camera (no landscape full screen view for instance). None of the other apps were as simple to use or had as many features. I love the background audio mode as I plan on using an old tablet as a baby monitor.

review_title: Scanner ONLY. You must but the cleaner.
text_review: This app is ONLY a scanner. You must purchase the actual cleaner. It runs a quick scan-but there's no way to tell how accurate it is w/o buying and running the associated cleaner. Very deceptive to call this a scanner AND cleaner. Even the description doesn't mention the reality of what this App is and isn't.

review_title: Nice App and Good Customer Support
text_review: I've been using this product for a couple years now and just bought it again for my newest phones.  The people that support this product have been really responsive in the past to my questions.  I also like to see when a company continues to improve on their software with regular updates.  You see upgrades to the app every month or two.  It gives you a good feeling that the company is planning to be around for the long haul.

This app starts out seeming great but after every scan, there are 8 viruses. (Just like everyone else said) andI just bought my fire hd 8, and I know there isn't any viruses let alone 8 and then you have to spend money to "fix& it. DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME

review_title: it works well for what I need
text_review: Just to watch my grandson when he is suppose to be taking a nap and I don't have the time or energy to run up and down the stairs to get him to lay down AGAIN and go to sleep, I can talk to him and convince him to do that for me.

It won't work with android wear watches. Which is why I purchased it. The description says it works with android wear watches. However, I get a pop-up that there is a bug with Amazon DRM protection. I don't like to give this a low reading, since it isn't the developers fault (if purchased from Google Play Store, it evidently works without a hitch). However, it still does not work as advertised.

Seems to help a bit, but it's hard to believe that I have three to five viruses each time that I cleaned my tablet. When I click the " see" title it won't show the files that are supposed to be infected. Also the promotional advertising for more of their own products are annoying.

This app started locking up my Kindle Fire so bad I had to do a hard reset, plug/unplug the power cable, then do another hard reset again just to get my Kindle to unlock and come back on. After contacting the developer multiple times, I realised he just didn't care. I have two other relatives who had the same problem, so I know it isn't just my Kindle. Actually, I have three Kindles, so that's a total of FIVE so far it won't work on. This app is a total loss, renders my Kindle unusable, and the developer is one of the worst I've dealt with on Amazon. He won't even respond to my requests for help anymore. I finally had to uninstall this app and bought "Ip cam viewer" (full) and found no problems so far with that one. Take my advice, if you have a Kindle Fire, stay away from this app. I do have to add this, the app does work well on my Nexus 7 tablet, but it does NOT WORK ON KINDLE FIRE DEVICES. If you have another kind of tablet, it is a hit or miss, try the free version first. Better yet, if you have IP cameras and want to be able to choose from a list of good monitoring apps that work, don't buy a Kindle in the first place. Buy something else that will allow purchases from the Google Playstore. There is a better selection and most likely your device will be compatible with this app. Good luck.

App appears to be working as advertised.  Finds both garbage and virus files and removes them.  However the quality of the user interface is so low that my confidence in the results is less than complete.  To be blunt, the user interface appears to be a joke.  It looks like something you would find on a game app for children.  It turns it turns me off something fierce.  It may just be me (probably is), but this shakes my confidence in the results and thus reduces the overall rating that I can give to the app.  Sorry, but I have to tell it like it is.

review_title: DO NOT BUY THIS PIECE OF JUNK!!!
text_review: I just paid for this app on my Fire TV Stick, and I'm extremely angry. When I run the app, it immediately freezes up and becomes unresponsive to inputs from the remote. Therefore, I cannot set up any cameras - in fact, I can't do ANYTHING except try to abort the app - which takes a long time to kill. So frustrating. What a piece of total garbage. I'm shocked that Amazon would even offer this app for sale. I will be attempting to get my money back. DO NOT BUY THIS!PS Aside from this tinyCam Monitor app annoyance, I'm really digging my new Fire TV Stick!

It seems like this is the best screen mirroring app available for Fire TV Stick. It works well screening my iPhone screen on Sony TV. You mirroring pictures on my phone. It can mirroring video file on my phone without sound. It does work when video within the app. Video within CNN or ESPN doesn’t play. This app is way below my expectations.

After using a popular cleaner, booster, virus scanning program for several years it occured to me that on three different tablets - and a zillion scans -not one virus had ever been detected. Upon noticing this application was designed for Kindle Fire tablets I thought I'd give it a go. On the first scan two viruses were found, cleaned, and eliminated. Today fourteen more were discovered! The process is lightning fast - no long wait. My Kindle Fire is working great.  Plus, I like the fact that this application is providing a higher level of protection for my tablet. There's a huge investment of money, time, and irreplaceable information on my tablet. It's foolish not to protect it.

The latest version regularly freezes my kindle fire and requires a reboot.  This also happens on my wife's fire and my Motorola attic (not as bad on the attic).  I have the latest foscam camera from amazon, so I assume this is should be a common setup...  This is very frustrating and unacceptable.  Do not buy the app until they release a fix.

review_title: The interface is clean and easy to navigate
text_review: I've tried several apps before finally deciding to use this app as my go-to app for my Foscam cameras. Camera set up is intuitive and straight forward. The interface is clean and easy to navigate. Easy to activate/deactivate the speaker/microphone on the camera as well as record video. Thanks tinyCam for a job well done. There were just way too many other apps, or few apps that do what you can in an easy user-friendly way.

review_title: Works so well I want to get more cameras!
text_review: Works great with my 3 Foscam Wifi P/T cameras!I tried the free version to verify that it could connect and operate my cameras, and it worked great, so I upgraded to the paid version (easy setup with the convenient export/import feature - very well thought out). The PRO features are totally worth the price.FastThis app works easily and the control/response from the camera is much faster than the app I was using on my iPhone. There is a lot of extra functionality like motion/audio detection and auto-recording and uploading. My kids like to turn the motion alarm on, and see if they can "Ninja" past the kitchen cam undetected (worth $3 right there just for the sustained silence/giggles from them!).Works on Fire StickI hadn't even thought of trying this on the Fire TV Stick until I read a few reviews here. I was really happy to see that it worked pretty well (the navigation is a little challenging, but you get used to it), and I was glad that one purchase gets me an app on 2 devices! Knowing that this works nicely on the Fire Stick opens up a bunch of possibilities for monitoring.Works great on Kindle Fire HDI can view all 3 cams at once, see/hear the motion alarm go off when there is movement, easily record, and do all the things you could imagine you would want to do in a security cam app.The Kindle Fire I have doesn't have a mic, but I read that headphones w/mic might work, and was very happy to find that my iPhone headphones work w/the Kindle, and I can talk/listen over the cameras with 'reasonable' clarity! I had pretty much given up on being able to talk over the cams, as all the apps I had tried in the past would send such garbled sound, (worse than Charlie Brown's teachers...kids look it up) and I couldn't get any mobile/desktop app to work with the Foscam 9821W talk functionality. This is the first app that lets me talk to that cam, and it works great!SecurityIt is great that SSL and encrypted password features are available, and work well, allowing you to access/control your cameras externally, but securely.The software is well designed and seems to be updated pretty frequently, as you can see from the support site: http://tinycammonitor.com/changelog.htmlNit-picks:- I wish the default view would have the movement controls- The 'preset' functions don't work for me

review_title: Better App than what I had......definitely!
text_review: I already had 2 Apps downloaded to check for viruses and to clean system......BUT I DOWNLOADED THIS JUST TO SEE WHAT IT WAS LIKE AND IT FOUND , ALL KINDS OF JUNK AND 7 viruses!  I think I will keep this App and get rid of the other ones!!!  Angelblue :)
